Tsiino Hiiwiida

Dimensões da biodiversidade de plantas e fungos no Alto Rio Negro

Chamada Expedições · Iniciativa Amazônia+10 · Brasil + Reino Unido

Tsiino Hiiwiida

Dimensões da biodiversidade de plantas e fungos no Alto Rio Negro

O projeto

Síntese

Revelar múltiplas dimensões da biodiversidade no Alto Rio Negro.

Tsiino Hiiwiida, nome Baniwa da região conhecida como Cabeça do Cachorro, é uma das últimas grandes fronteiras de conhecimento sobre a biodiversidade amazônica. O projeto foi aprovada na Chamada Expedições da Iniciativa Amazônia+10 e articula instituições do Brasil e do Reino Unido para revelar múltiplas dimensões da flora e da funga no Alto Rio Negro.

Campinaranas, florestas de terra-firme, igapós, serras e formações aluviais na fronteira entre Brasil, Colômbia e Venezuela. A heterogeneidade ambiental e a longa história geológica da Bacia Amazônica fazem da região um grande cenário para entender evolução, distribuição e endemismos.

O objetivo é acelerar a documentação de plantas e fungos, preencher lacunas taxonômicas, biogeográficas e evolutivas, e formar novas redes de pesquisa com participação local. A expedições de campo, identificação taxonômica, coleções científicas, sistemática molecular, metagenômica, biomonitoramento e comunicação pública.

Da coleta em rios e serras ao catálogo público: o projeto transforma registros de campo, coleções biológicas em conhecimento acessível sobre a flora e a funga da Cabeça do Cachorro.

São Gabriel da Cachoeira

Município de atuação do projeto na região da Cabeça do Cachorro, Alto Rio Negro.

Três eixos do Projeto

Eixo 1

Habitats e espécies

Compreender campinaranas, florestas de terra-firme, igapós, serras e formações aluviais como mosaicos vivos da flora e da funga do Alto Rio Negro.

Eixo 2

Biodiversidade, sustento e bioeconomia

Investigar PANC, segurança alimentar, nutrientes, metais pesados e usos potenciais de espécies vegetais em diálogo com conhecimentos e demandas locais.

Eixo 3

Campo e tecnologias emergentes

Integrar vouchers, coleções, DNA, metabarcoding, biomonitoramento, bancos de dados e comunicação pública para transformar coletas em conhecimento acessível.

Como o projeto atua

Do campo ao acervo

Cada etapa conecta pesquisa de campo, coleções científicas, análises moleculares, formação de pessoas e comunicação. Assim, os dados coletados durante as expedições retornam como acervo, catálogo, material educativo, exposição e memória pública sobre o Alto Rio Negro.

01

Campo e território

Expedições em diferentes habitats do Alto Rio Negro, articuladas com atores locais e comunidades indígenas, para registrar plantas, fungos e contextos ecológicos.

02

Coleções e amostras

Herborização, vouchers, fotografias, tecidos em sílica-gel e incorporação prioritária aos acervos amazônicos, fortalecendo INPA, MG e coleções parceiras.

03

Dados e validação

Revisão taxonômica, mineração de bases, HerbariumBlitz, sequenciamento, metabarcoding e análises para reduzir lacunas Linneanas, Wallaceanas e Darwinianas.

04

Retorno e circulação

Catálogo verificado, oficinas botânicas, materiais em múltiplas línguas, exposições, fotografia, ilustração científica, redes sociais e curta documental.

Catálogo

Primeira síntese taxonomicamente verificada da flora e funga da Cabeça do Cachorro.

AmaTreeDNA

Banco de tecidos e DNA associado a vouchers de herbário para pesquisas futuras.

Bioeconomia

PANC, segurança alimentar, nutrientes e metais analisados com foco em espécies locais.

Memória pública

Exposições, audiovisual e comunicação em português, inglês, Baniwa, Tukano e Nheengatu.

Objetivos

Objetivos do projeto

Navegue pelas frentes de trabalho do Tsiino Hiiwiida em cards amplos, soltos sobre o fundo da página, com um objetivo em destaque e os próximos objetivos entrando pela extremidade direita da tela.

01 Campo

Expedições nos rios Negro, Curicuriari, Içana e Vaupés

Campanhas de campo irão amostrar campinaranas, florestas de terra-firme, igapós, serras e afloramentos rochosos, com foco em plantas vasculares, criptógamas e fungos.

02 Diversidade críptica e taxonomia integrativa

Revelar linhagens crípticas, raras e pouco conhecidas

Metabarcoding, dados moleculares, morfologia, coleções históricas e novas coletas serão integrados para detectar organismos pouco visíveis aos inventários tradicionais.

03 Interações ecológicas

Fungos, hospedeiros e relações ecológicas complexas

A frente investiga a diversidade e evolução de fungos associados a insetos, ampliando o conhecimento sobre interações amazônicas ainda pouco documentadas.

04 Bioeconomia e segurança alimentar

PANC, nutrientes e metais em espécies de interesse local

Plantas alimentícias não convencionais, macro e micronutrientes e metais serão analisados conectando biodiversidade, alimentação, saúde ambiental e bioeconomia.

05 Biomonitoramento

Bioindicadores para acompanhar qualidade ambiental

Musgos e outros grupos sensíveis serão usados para investigar contaminantes e criar uma base de referência para monitoramento ambiental em áreas indígenas.

06 Acervos e dados públicos

Catálogo verificado, herbários e banco AmaTreeDNA

As coletas irão fortalecer herbários amazônicos, apoiar a digitalização de espécimes e consolidar o primeiro catálogo da flora e funga da região.

07 Formação e comunicação

Oficinas, estudantes, parataxonomistas e comunicação multilíngue

Oficinas Botânicas, formação de estudantes, participação de parataxonomistas e tradução para Baniwa, Tukano e Nheengatu integram o retorno social do projeto.

Rede de coordenação científica

Rede de coordenação científica

O projeto é coordenado por uma rede multidisciplinar vinculada a instituições amazônicas, centros de pesquisa de outros estados brasileiros e parceiros do Reino Unido.

A rede combina taxonomia, sistemática, bioinformática, micologia, briologia, florística, química de solos, comunicação científica, audiovisual e colaboração com parataxonomistas e representantes indígenas.

30 instituições articuladas
66 pesquisadores, estudantes e equipe técnica

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

find_up <- function(rel_path, start = getwd(), max_levels = 8) {
  d <- normalizePath(start, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
  for (i in 0:max_levels) {
    cand <- file.path(d, rel_path)
    if (file.exists(cand)) return(cand)
    parent <- dirname(d)
    if (identical(parent, d)) break
    d <- parent
  }
  NA_character_
}

read_optional_csv <- function(rel_path) {
  path <- find_up(rel_path)
  if (is.na(path)) return(data.frame())
  tryCatch(
    read.csv(
      path,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
      check.names = FALSE,
      fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM",
      na.strings = c("", "NA", "NaN")
    ),
    error = function(e) data.frame()
  )
}

col_or <- function(data, candidates, default = "") {
  if (nrow(data) == 0) return(character())
  hit <- intersect(candidates, names(data))
  if (length(hit) == 0) return(rep(default, nrow(data)))
  x <- as.character(data[[hit[1]]])
  x[is.na(x)] <- default
  x
}

nz <- function(x) !is.na(x) & nzchar(trimws(as.character(x)))

safe <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x[is.na(x) | trimws(x) == ""] <- "—"
  htmltools::htmlEscape(x)
}
```

```{=html}
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Montserrat:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600;8..60,700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<link
  rel="stylesheet"
  href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"
/>

<script
  src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js">
</script>
<style>
  :root{
    --red: #A93632;
    --red-dark: #6E1F1D;
    --green: #626A38;
    --green-dark: #2E3B24;
    --green-soft: #D7DDC5;
    --ochre: #D99A27;
    --cream: #F6F1E8;
    --paper: #FFFDF7;
    --ink: #171717;
    --muted: #675F55;
    --line: rgba(98,106,56,0.24);
  }

  *{
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  html{
    scroll-behavior: smooth;
    overflow-x: hidden;
  }

  body{
    overflow-x: hidden;
    background:
      linear-gradient(rgba(246,241,232,0.88), rgba(246,241,232,0.88)),
      url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
    background-repeat: no-repeat;
    background-size: cover;
    background-attachment: fixed;
    background-position: center top;
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    color: var(--ink);
  }

  main.content,
  #quarto-content,
  main{
    width: 100%;
    background: transparent;
  }

  main.content{
    padding-top: 0;
    padding-bottom: 3.5rem;
  }

  .quarto-title-block{
    display: none !important;
  }

  .navbar{
    box-shadow: 0 2px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  }

  .navbar .navbar-brand,
  .navbar .nav-link{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  }

  .navbar .nav-link.active-section{
    color: var(--red) !important;
    font-weight: 800;
    border-bottom: 2px solid var(--red);
  }
  
/* NAVBAR FLUTUANTE NA HOME */

/* Remove qualquer espaço reservado pelo Quarto acima do conteúdo */
html,
body{
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

body.nav-fixed{
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

#quarto-content,
main,
main.content{
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
}

/* Header transparente, sem faixa própria */
#quarto-header{
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 0 !important;
  left: 0 !important;
  right: 0 !important;
  z-index: 10000 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* Navbar sobre o vídeo, sem caixa cinza e sem linha */
#quarto-header .navbar{
  position: relative !important;
  top: 0 !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
  background: transparent !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-bottom: 0 !important;
  min-height: 76px;
  backdrop-filter: none !important;
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: none !important;
}

/* Degradê sutil por cima do vídeo, sem virar faixa sólida */
#quarto-header::before{
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0 0 auto 0;
  height: 120px;
  background: linear-gradient(
    180deg,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.42) 0%,
    rgba(0,0,0,0.18) 58%,
    rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%
  );
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: -1;
}

/* Esconde o nome textual da navbar na home; a marca já aparece na hero */
#quarto-header .navbar-brand{
  display: none !important;
}

/* Links e ícones brancos */
#quarto-header .navbar .nav-link,
#quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:visited{
  color: #fff !important;
  text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.72);
}

#quarto-header .navbar .nav-link.active,
#quarto-header .navbar .nav-link:hover{
  color: var(--ochre) !important;
}

#quarto-header .navbar svg,
#quarto-header .navbar i,
#quarto-header .navbar .bi,
#quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools a,
#quarto-header .quarto-navbar-tools button,
#quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButton,
#quarto-header .aa-DetachedSearchButtonIcon,
#quarto-header .quarto-color-scheme-toggle{
  color: #fff !important;
  fill: #fff !important;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.55));
}

  /* HERO inspirado na lógica visual Oxford:
     vídeo visível + degradê + texto sobreposto, sem card gigante */
.hero-strip{
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100vw;
  min-height: 100vh;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  overflow: hidden;
  background-image: none;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center center;
  isolation: isolate;
  box-shadow: none;
}
.hero-video{
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center center;
  z-index: -4;
}

  .hero-overlay{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -3;
    background:
      linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.46) 42%, rgba(0,0,0,0.10) 100%),
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.12) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.25) 48%, rgba(0,0,0,0.72) 100%);
  }

.hero-logo-badge{
  position: absolute;
  top: clamp(5.2rem, 9vw, 7rem);
  left: clamp(1.5rem, 3.5vw, 2.5rem);
  width: clamp(92px, 8vw, 132px);
  min-height: auto;
  display: block;
  padding: 0;
  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  z-index: 5;
}

.hero-logo-badge img{
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35));
}
  .hero-logo-badge.logo-missing::after{
    content: "Tsiino Hiiwiida";
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    line-height: 1.2;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    text-align: center;
  }

.hero-title-panel{
  position: absolute;
  left: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 5rem);
  top: clamp(14.5rem, 32vh, 18rem);
  bottom: auto;
  width: min(940px, calc(100% - 4rem));
  color: #fff;
  padding-top: 0;
  z-index: 4;
}

  .hero-kicker{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 1vw, 0.82rem);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.13em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    color: var(--ochre);
    margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.65);
  }

.hero-title-panel h1{
  margin: 0;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 6rem);
  line-height: 0.9;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.07em;
  text-shadow: 0 3px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
}

  .hero-subtitle{
    margin: 1rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: #F6F1E8 !important;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
    font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 1.45vw, 1.05rem) !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    line-height: 1.45 !important;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.70);
  }

  .hero-description{
    margin: 0.9rem 0 0 0 !important;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92) !important;
    font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.6vw, 1.25rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.58 !important;
    max-width: 760px;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.68);
  }

  .hero-actions{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.65rem;
    margin-top: 1.25rem;
  }

  .btn-main,
  .btn-ghost{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 0.45rem;
    padding: 0.68rem 1.05rem;
    border-radius: 999px;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    text-decoration: none !important;
    transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
  }

  .btn-main{
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff !important;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
  }

  .btn-ghost{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.90);
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.72);
  }

  .btn-main:hover,
  .btn-ghost:hover{
    transform: translateY(-1px);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.24);
  }

  .hero-video-toggle{
    position: absolute;
    right: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2rem);
    bottom: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 2rem);
    width: 58px;
    height: 58px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.78);
    background: rgba(0,0,0,0.28);
    color: #fff;
    font-size: 1.15rem;
    font-weight: 800;
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  }

  .hero-video-toggle .icon-pause{
    width: 20px;
    height: 24px;
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 6px);
    gap: 6px;
    align-items: stretch;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .hero-video-toggle .icon-pause::before,
  .hero-video-toggle .icon-pause::after{
    content: "";
    display: block;
    background: currentColor;
    border-radius: 2px;
  }

  .hero-video-toggle .icon-play{
    display: none;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    margin-left: 4px;
    border-top: 12px solid transparent;
    border-bottom: 12px solid transparent;
    border-left: 19px solid currentColor;
  }

  .hero-video-toggle.is-paused .icon-pause{
    display: none;
  }

  .hero-video-toggle.is-paused .icon-play{
    display: block;
  }

  /* SEÇÕES */
  .content-card{
    width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
    margin: 2.6rem auto 0 auto;
    padding: clamp(1.35rem, 3vw, 2.35rem);
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 15px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    border-top: 5px solid var(--green);
  }

  .section-title{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 96px 1fr;
    gap: 0.75rem;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  }

  .section-title::before{
    content: "";
    display: block;
    height: 1px;
    background: var(--ink);
  }

  .section-title h2{
    margin: 0;
    padding-bottom: 0.45rem;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 1.85rem);
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--red);
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
  }

  .content-card p{
    font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    line-height: 1.72;
    color: var(--ink);
    margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  }

  .lead{
    font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif !important;
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 2vw, 1.26rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.72 !important;
    color: #191711 !important;
    border-left: 4px solid var(--ochre);
    padding-left: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 1.3rem !important;
  }

.two-col{
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.05fr) minmax(340px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 1.6rem;
  align-items: start;
}

.project-side{
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 1rem;
}

/* Caixas Plantas/Fungos no final do resumo */
.taxa-summary-grid{
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.85rem;
  margin-top: 1.35rem;
}

.taxa-card{
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 1.05rem 1rem;
  min-height: 138px;
  color: var(--cream);
  background:
    linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(46,59,36,0.93),
      rgba(98,106,56,0.82)
    ),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.22);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
}

.taxa-card::after{
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 85% 20%, rgba(217,154,39,0.24), transparent 32%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.05), rgba(0,0,0,0.18));
  pointer-events: none;
}

.taxa-card-content{
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.taxa-card h3{
  margin: 0 0 0.55rem 0;
  color: var(--ochre);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.86rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
}

.taxa-card p{
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.93) !important;
  font-size: 0.86rem !important;
  line-height: 1.55 !important;
}

/* Mapa territorial no card lateral */
.project-map-card{
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.86);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.25);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
}

.project-map-header{
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem 0.65rem 1rem;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(46,59,36,0.88), rgba(46,59,36,0.88)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  color: var(--cream);
}

.project-map-header h3{
  margin: 0;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.11em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ochre);
}

.project-map-header p{
  margin: 0.35rem 0 0 0 !important;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.88) !important;
  font-size: 0.82rem !important;
  line-height: 1.45 !important;
}

#project-sgc-map{
  width: 100%;
  height: 285px;
  background: var(--green-soft);
}

.project-map-caption{
  padding: 0.65rem 0.85rem;
  font-size: 0.74rem !important;
  line-height: 1.45 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-style: italic;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92);
}

/* Foto vertical abaixo do mapa */
.project-vertical-photo{
  margin: 0;
  width: 100%;
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--green-soft);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
}

.project-vertical-photo img{
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: clamp(360px, 42vw, 520px);
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center center;
}

.project-vertical-photo figcaption{
  padding: 0.72rem 0.9rem;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-style: italic;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.88);
}

/* ===== Ajuste editorial da seção O projeto ===== */

#o-projeto.content-card {
  width: min(1180px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
}

#o-projeto .project-layout {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.02fr) minmax(390px, 0.98fr);
  gap: clamp(1.8rem, 3.2vw, 2.8rem);
  align-items: stretch;
}

#o-projeto .project-copy {
  min-width: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

#o-projeto .project-side {
  height: 100%;
}

#o-projeto .project-map-card {
  border-radius: 22px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

#o-projeto #project-sgc-map {
  height: 245px;
}

#o-projeto .project-map-caption {
  display: none;
}

#o-projeto .project-feature-photo {
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 24px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #1f2818;
  box-shadow: 0 18px 38px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
}

#o-projeto .project-feature-photo img {
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: clamp(560px, 56vw, 760px);
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center top;
  filter: saturate(0.96) contrast(1.04);
}

#o-projeto .project-feature-photo figcaption {
  padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.45;
  color: var(--muted);
  font-style: italic;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.92);
}

#o-projeto .photo-chip {
  position: absolute;
  top: 1rem;
  left: 1rem;
  z-index: 3;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.42rem 0.75rem;
  background: rgba(46,59,36,0.82);
  color: var(--ochre);
  border: 1px solid rgba(246,241,232,0.25);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
}

#o-projeto .taxa-summary-grid {
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.35rem;
  margin-top: auto;
  flex: 1;
  display: grid;
}

#o-projeto .taxa-card {
  min-height: 200px;
  padding: 2rem 2.15rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.13);
}

#o-projeto .taxa-card h3 {
  font-size: 1.22rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
}

#o-projeto .taxa-card p {
  font-size: 1.28rem !important;
  line-height: 1.72 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 980px){
  .two-col{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .taxa-summary-grid{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  #project-sgc-map{
    height: 320px;
  }

  #o-projeto .project-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  #o-projeto .project-feature-photo img {
    height: auto;
    object-fit: contain;
  }
}
  .info-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .info-grid-three{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-top: 1rem;
  }

  .info-box{
    min-width: 0;
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.72);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1.1rem 1.15rem;
  }

  .info-box h3,
  .people-block h3{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-size: 0.78rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.11em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    margin: 0 0 0.7rem 0;
  }

  .info-box ul,
  .people-list{
    list-style: none;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .info-box li,
  .people-list li{
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 1.25rem;
    margin: 0.52rem 0;
    line-height: 1.55;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 0.95rem;
  }

  .info-box li::before,
  .people-list li::before{
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 0.58rem;
    width: 7px;
    height: 7px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--ochre);
  }

  .tags{
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: 0.6rem;
    margin: 1rem 0 0.2rem 0;
  }

  .tag{
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    border-radius: 999px;
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28);
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.82);
    color: var(--green-dark);
    padding: 0.32rem 0.72rem;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .tag:nth-child(2n){
    color: var(--red);
    border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.30);
  }

  .tag:nth-child(3n){
    color: #7A5A18;
    border-color: rgba(217,154,39,0.42);
  }
  
  .map-card{
    background: rgba(98,106,56,0.09);
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.25);
    border-radius: 18px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .map-card img{
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    height: 320px;
    object-fit: cover;
    background: var(--green-soft);
  }

  .map-caption{
    padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
    font-size: 0.82rem !important;
    color: var(--muted) !important;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .expedition-preview-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .expedition-preview-card{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.78);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .expedition-date{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    color: var(--red);
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .expedition-preview-card h3{
    margin: 0.35rem 0 0.45rem 0;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .expedition-preview-card p{
    font-size: 0.88rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  .media-layout{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1.2rem;
  }

  .media-panel{
    min-width: 0;
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.78);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 18px;
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .media-panel-header{
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 1rem;
    margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  }

  .media-panel h3{
    margin: 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.1em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .media-panel-label{
    display: inline-flex;
    border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 0.28rem 0.6rem;
    background: var(--red);
    color: #fff;
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.65rem;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .media-carousel{
    display: flex;
    gap: 0.9rem;
    overflow-x: auto;
    scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    padding: 0.2rem 0.1rem 0.8rem 0.1rem;
  }

  .media-item{
    flex: 0 0 min(310px, 85%);
    scroll-snap-align: start;
    background: var(--paper);
    border-radius: 15px;
    overflow: hidden;
    border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
    box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
  }

  .media-thumb{
    width: 100%;
    height: 160px;
    background:
      radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(217,154,39,0.28), transparent 30%),
      linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.28), rgba(169,54,50,0.18));
    display: grid;
    place-items: center;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.72rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .media-thumb img{
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
  }

  .media-body{
    padding: 0.9rem;
  }

  .media-date{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.64rem;
    color: var(--red);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .media-body h4{
    margin: 0.35rem 0 0.45rem 0;
    color: var(--ink);
    font-size: 0.98rem;
    line-height: 1.32;
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  .media-body p{
    font-size: 0.82rem;
    line-height: 1.48;
    color: var(--muted);
    margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
  }

  .media-link{
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.68rem;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--red) !important;
    text-decoration: none !important;
  }

  .empty-media{
    padding: 1rem;
    background: rgba(255,253,247,0.74);
    border: 1px dashed rgba(169,54,50,0.32);
    border-radius: 14px;
    color: var(--muted);
    font-size: 0.9rem;
    line-height: 1.55;
  }

  .people-block{
    margin-top: 1.4rem;
    padding-top: 1.2rem;
    border-top: 1px dashed rgba(98,106,56,0.35);
  }

  .resource-line{
    font-size: 1.08rem !important;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--green-dark) !important;
  }

  .contact-grid{
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: 1rem;
  }

  .contact-card{
    background: rgba(246,241,232,0.78);
    border: 1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius: 16px;
    padding: 1rem;
  }

  .contact-card h3{
    margin: 0 0 0.45rem 0;
    color: var(--green-dark);
    font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
    font-size: 0.76rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.08em;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  .contact-card a{
    color: var(--red);
    text-decoration: none;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  .photo-credit{
    margin-top: 1.2rem;
    padding-top: 0.85rem;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    font-size: 0.76rem !important;
    font-style: italic;
    color: var(--muted) !important;
  }

/* CARROSSEL DE OBJETIVOS */

.objectives-section{
  width: min(1120px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  margin: 2.6rem auto 0 auto;
  padding: 0;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
  box-shadow: 0 15px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  overflow: hidden;
  border-top: 5px solid var(--green);
}

.objectives-carousel{
  position: relative;
  min-height: 560px;
}

.objective-slide{
  display: none;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(300px, 0.82fr);
  gap: clamp(1.5rem, 4vw, 4rem);
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 560px;
  padding: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 4rem);
}

.objective-slide.active{
  display: grid;
}

.objective-text{
  max-width: 620px;
}

.objective-kicker{
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  color: var(--ochre);
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.13em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
}

.objective-text h2{
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
  color: var(--red);
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.2vw, 3.25rem);
  line-height: 1.12;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
}

.objective-text p{
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--ink);
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.8vw, 1.25rem);
  line-height: 1.65;
}

.objective-image-wrap{
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

.objective-image{
  position: relative;
  width: min(430px, 36vw);
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
  border-radius: 50%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.18), rgba(169,54,50,0.10)),
    var(--cream);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.14);
}

.objective-photo-slide{
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(1.02);
  transition: opacity 0.45s ease, transform 0.45s ease;
}

.objective-photo-slide.active{
  opacity: 1;
  transform: scale(1);
}

.objective-photo-slide img{
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}

/* Setas internas do carrossel de fotos — discretas dentro da imagem circular */

.objective-photo-arrow {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.34);
  color: #fff;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.35);
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}

.objective-photo-arrow:hover {
  background: rgba(169,54,50,0.86);
}

.objective-photo-prev{
  left: 0.85rem;
}

.objective-photo-next{
  right: 0.85rem;
}

.objective-photo-dots{
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 1rem;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.35rem;
  z-index: 9;
}

.objective-photo-dot{
  width: 7px;
  height: 7px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 0;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  cursor: pointer;
}

.objective-photo-dot.active{
  width: 20px;
  background: #fff;
}

/* Navegação principal do carrossel de objetivos — controle inferior */

.objective-nav {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 0.78rem;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: min(250px, calc(100% - 2rem));
  height: 42px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 14;
}

.objective-arrow {
  position: static;
  transform: none;
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.86);
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-size: 1.45rem;
  line-height: 1;
  display: grid;
  place-items: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  pointer-events: auto;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
  transition: background 0.18s ease, color 0.18s ease, transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease;
}

.objective-arrow:hover {
  background: var(--red);
  color: #fff;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.objective-prev,
.objective-next {
  left: auto;
  right: auto;
}

.objective-dots {
  position: absolute;
  left: 50%;
  bottom: 1.42rem;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  z-index: 15;
  pointer-events: auto;
}

.objective-dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  border: 0;
  background: rgba(98,106,56,0.32);
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: width 0.18s ease, background 0.18s ease;
}

.objective-dot.active {
  width: 26px;
  background: var(--red);
}

@media (max-width: 980px){
  .two-col,
  .media-layout,
  .contact-grid{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .expedition-preview-grid,
  .info-grid-three{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .quick-facts{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  }

  .objective-slide{
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    min-height: auto;
    padding: 2rem 1.2rem 4rem 1.2rem;
  }

  .objective-image{
    width: min(330px, 78vw);
  }

  .objective-prev{
    left: 0.75rem;
  }

  .objective-next{
    right: 0.75rem;
  }
}

  @media (max-width: 820px){
.hero-strip{
  width: 100vw;
  min-height: 100vh;
  margin-top: 0;
}

.hero-title-panel{
  left: 1rem;
  top: 9.5rem;
  bottom: auto;
  width: calc(100% - 2rem);
  padding-top: 0;
}

    .hero-logo-badge{
      left: 0.75rem;
      width: 76px;
      min-height: 76px;
    }

    .hero-video-toggle{
      width: 48px;
      height: 48px;
      right: 1rem;
      bottom: 1rem;
    }

    .content-card{
      width: calc(100vw - 1rem);
      padding: 1.35rem 1rem;
    }

    .section-title{
      grid-template-columns: 56px 1fr;
    }

    .info-grid{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 520px){
    .quick-facts{
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }

    .hero-logo-badge{
      display: none;
    }

    .hero-actions{
      gap: 0.45rem;
    }

    .btn-main,
    .btn-ghost{
      width: 100%;
    }
    
    .objective-text h2{
  font-size: clamp(1.75rem, 10vw, 2.45rem);
}

.objective-text p{
  font-size: 1rem;
}

.objective-arrow{
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  font-size: 1.65rem;
}
    
  }
  
 /* Ajustes para tela intermediária: notebook meia tela / tablet horizontal */
@media (max-width: 991.98px) {
  .hero-logo-badge {
    top: 4.9rem;
    left: 0.75rem;
    width: 78px;
  }

  .hero-title-panel {
    top: 11.4rem;
    left: 0.75rem;
    width: calc(100% - 1.5rem);
  }

  /* Menu colapsado mais legível sobre o vídeo */
  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show,
  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing {
    margin-top: 0.6rem;
    padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
    width: min(280px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
    background: rgba(23, 23, 23, 0.72) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(246, 241, 232, 0.22);
    border-radius: 18px;
    box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link,
  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.collapsing .nav-link {
    color: #F6F1E8 !important;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 0.45rem 0.25rem;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
  }

  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link:hover,
  #quarto-header .navbar-collapse.show .nav-link.active-section {
    color: var(--ochre) !important;
  }
}

/* ===== Pesquisadores responsáveis ===== */

.researchers-section {
  width: min(1180px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  overflow: hidden;
}

.researchers-layout {
  width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.92fr) minmax(0, 1.08fr);
  gap: clamp(1.4rem, 2.4vw, 2.2rem);
  align-items: start;
}

.researchers-copy {
  min-width: 0;
  padding-top: 0.8rem;
}

.researchers-kicker {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
  padding: 0.32rem 0.72rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(98, 106, 56, 0.12);
  color: var(--green-dark);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98, 106, 56, 0.22);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.researchers-lead {
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.05rem, 1.45vw, 1.22rem) !important;
}

.researchers-copy p:not(.lead) {
  color: var(--muted);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 520px;
}

.researchers-summary {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin-top: 1.15rem;
  max-width: 520px;
}

.researchers-summary div {
  padding: 0.85rem;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.14), rgba(217,154,39,0.08)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.72);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
}

.researchers-number {
  display: block;
  color: var(--red);
  font-size: 1.18rem;
  font-weight: 900;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.researchers-label {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.3rem;
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  line-height: 1.35;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.researchers-actions {
  margin-top: 1.35rem !important;
}

/* painel dos pesquisadores */
.researchers-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
  padding: clamp(0.95rem, 1.6vw, 1.25rem);
  border-radius: 22px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(217,154,39,0.13), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.92), rgba(246,241,232,0.76));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  box-shadow: 0 14px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.09);
}

.researchers-panel-header {
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.7rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
}

.researchers-panel-header h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.researchers-list {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.researcher-card {
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0.9rem 0.95rem;
  border-radius: 17px;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.96);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.16);
  box-shadow: 0 7px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.055);
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, border-color 0.18s ease;
}

.researcher-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.28);
  box-shadow: 0 11px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.agency-pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
  padding: 0.22rem 0.52rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: var(--green);
  color: var(--cream);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.researcher-card h4 {
  margin: 0 0 0.38rem 0;
  color: var(--ink);
  font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 1vw, 0.98rem);
  line-height: 1.24;
  font-weight: 850;
}

.researcher-card p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-size: 0.78rem !important;
  line-height: 1.42 !important;
}

@media (max-width: 1150px) {
  .researchers-layout {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.95fr) minmax(0, 1.05fr);
    gap: 1.4rem;
  }

  .researchers-list {
    gap: 0.65rem;
  }
}

/* tablet e celular: empilha */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .researchers-section {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem);
  }

  .researchers-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    width: 100%;
  }

  .researchers-copy p:not(.lead),
  .researchers-summary {
    max-width: 100%;
  }
}

/* celular estreito: cards em uma coluna */
@media (max-width: 620px) {
  .researchers-list {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .researchers-summary {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .researchers-panel {
    padding: 0.85rem;
    border-radius: 18px;
  }
}

/* ===== Redesenho editorial da página inicial / about ===== */

.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(44px);
  transition:
    opacity 0.72s ease,
    transform 0.72s cubic-bezier(.2,.7,.2,1);
  transition-delay: var(--reveal-delay, 0ms);
  will-change: opacity, transform;
}

.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
}

.full-bleed-feature.reveal-ready {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(44px);
}

.full-bleed-feature.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-ready,
  .full-bleed-feature.reveal-ready {
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
    transition: none !important;
  }

  .full-bleed-feature.reveal-ready,
  .full-bleed-feature.reveal-ready.is-visible {
    transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
  }
}

.about-section {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  padding: clamp(1.4rem, 3.4vw, 3rem);
}

.about-intro-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(360px, 0.92fr);
  gap: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 3.4rem);
  align-items: start;
}

.about-eyebrow,
.method-eyebrow,
.feature-eyebrow {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  width: fit-content;
  margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.76rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: rgba(98,106,56,0.12);
  color: var(--green-dark);
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.about-display-title {
  margin: 0 0 1.1rem 0;
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 5.2vw, 5.15rem);
  line-height: 0.92;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.075em;
  max-width: 820px;
}

.about-copy-columns {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.8rem);
  margin-top: 1.25rem;
}

.about-copy-columns p {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
}

.about-pullquote {
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  padding: clamp(1.15rem, 2.2vw, 1.55rem);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--ochre);
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(217,154,39,0.10), rgba(98,106,56,0.08)),
    rgba(246,241,232,0.74);
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.2rem, 2.2vw, 1.65rem);
  line-height: 1.38;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.about-map-stack {
  display: grid;
  gap: 1rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.about-map-stack .project-map-card {
  border-radius: 24px;
}

.about-map-stack #project-sgc-map {
  height: clamp(290px, 32vw, 390px);
}

.about-stat-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.8rem;
}

.about-stat {
  min-height: 126px;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.92), rgba(98,106,56,0.86)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  color: var(--cream);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-end;
}

.about-stat strong {
  display: block;
  color: var(--ochre);
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4vw, 3.2rem);
  line-height: 0.9;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.07em;
}

.about-stat span {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 0.55rem;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.66rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  line-height: 1.38;
}

.about-photo-quote {
  position: relative;
  margin: 1rem 0 0 0;
  border-radius: 24px;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 360px;
  background: var(--green-dark);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
}

.about-photo-quote img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  min-height: 360px;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  filter: saturate(0.96) contrast(1.04);
  display: block;
}

.about-photo-quote figcaption {
  position: absolute;
  left: 1rem;
  right: 1rem;
  bottom: 1rem;
  padding: 0.85rem 0.95rem;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.58);
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}

.full-bleed-feature {
  position: relative;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 100vw;
  margin: 3.4rem 0 0 0;
  padding: clamp(2.8rem, 5vw, 5rem) 0 0 0;
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,241,232,0.90), rgba(246,241,232,0.72)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.feature-title-wrap {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
  margin: 0 auto clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2.1rem) auto;
}

.feature-title {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.45rem 0.85rem;
  background: var(--green);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(1.45rem, 3vw, 2.6rem);
  line-height: 1;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.10);
}

.feature-title::before {
  content: "";
  width: 18px;
  height: 46px;
  margin-right: 0.65rem;
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(255,255,255,0.95) 0 3px,
      transparent 3px 6px
    );
  border-left: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
}

.feature-band {
  width: 100%;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr));
  min-height: clamp(420px, 42vw, 600px);
}

.feature-photo,
.feature-panel {
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: clamp(420px, 42vw, 600px);
}

.feature-photo {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--green-dark);
}

.feature-photo img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: center;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 1.2s ease;
}

.feature-photo:hover img {
  transform: scale(1.05);
}

.feature-panel {
  position: relative;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: clamp(1.2rem, 2.6vw, 2.2rem);
  color: #fff;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.feature-panel::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 80% 15%, rgba(255,255,255,0.13), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.04), rgba(0,0,0,0.12));
  pointer-events: none;
}

.feature-panel > * {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
}

.feature-panel-green {
  background: #7D963B;
}

.feature-panel-deep {
  background: #3F7A38;
}

.feature-panel-ochre {
  background: #A9771E;
}

.feature-panel h3 {
  margin: 0 0 auto 0;
  width: fit-content;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.78rem;
  background: #201916;
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.feature-panel p {
  margin: auto 0 0 0 !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.15rem, 2vw, 1.55rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.method-section {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
}

.method-intro-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.85fr) minmax(0, 1.15fr);
  gap: clamp(1.4rem, 3vw, 2.5rem);
  align-items: start;
}

.method-intro-grid .lead {
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.method-river {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0;
  margin-top: 1.6rem;
  border-radius: 26px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--green-dark);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.method-step {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 275px;
  padding: clamp(1.2rem, 2vw, 1.65rem);
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.92), rgba(246,241,232,0.84));
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
}

.method-step:nth-child(even) {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(215,221,197,0.76), rgba(246,241,232,0.84));
}

.method-step:last-child {
  border-right: 0;
}

.method-number {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  width: 3.2rem;
  height: 3.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.1rem;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--red);
  color: #fff;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

.method-step h3 {
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem 0;
  color: var(--green-dark);
  font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1.5vw, 1.32rem);
  line-height: 1.16;
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.04em;
}

.method-step p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-size: 0.9rem !important;
  line-height: 1.58 !important;
}

.impact-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.9rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}

.impact-card {
  min-height: 188px;
  padding: 1rem;
  border-radius: 20px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.84);
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.impact-card h3 {
  margin: 0;
  color: var(--red);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.impact-card p {
  margin: 1rem 0 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--green-dark) !important;
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.4vw, 1.16rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.32 !important;
  font-weight: 800;
}

.objectives-section {
  width: min(1280px, calc(100vw - 1rem));
}

.objective-text h2 {
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.06em;
}

.objective-text p {
  max-width: 680px;
}

.objective-kicker {
  color: #8B641A;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .feature-band {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .feature-photo,
  .feature-panel {
    min-height: 360px;
  }

  .impact-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .about-section,
  .method-section {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem);
  }

  .about-intro-grid,
  .method-intro-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .about-copy-columns,
  .method-river {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .method-step {
    min-height: auto;
    border-right: 0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
  }

  .method-step:last-child {
    border-bottom: 0;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .feature-band {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .feature-photo,
  .feature-panel {
    min-height: 310px;
  }

  .feature-panel p {
    font-size: 1.35rem !important;
  }

  .about-stat-grid,
  .impact-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .about-display-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 13vw, 3.8rem);
  }
}


/* ===== Refinamentos de layout solicitados: cards mais legíveis e paleta unificada ===== */

.about-section,
.method-section,
#expedicoes-recentes,
#divulgacao,
.researchers-section {
  width: min(1260px, calc(100vw - 2rem));
}

.about-intro-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(420px, 0.64fr);
  gap: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.8rem);
}

.about-map-stack {
  gap: 0.85rem;
}

.about-map-stack .project-map-card {
  min-width: 0;
}

.about-map-stack #project-sgc-map,
.about-map-stack #project-sgc-map * {
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  word-break: normal;
}

.about-stat-grid {
  gap: 0.72rem;
}

.about-stat {
  min-height: 140px;
  padding: 0.95rem 0.9rem;
  justify-content: space-between;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.about-stat strong {
  font-size: clamp(2.05rem, 3.15vw, 2.9rem);
  line-height: 0.96;
  letter-spacing: -0.045em;
}

.about-stat span {
  margin-top: 0.55rem;
  font-size: clamp(0.53rem, 0.62vw, 0.64rem);
  line-height: 1.23;
  letter-spacing: 0.072em;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  hyphens: none;
}

/* Seção em largura cheia: mantém a dinâmica fluida, mas volta para a paleta da identidade */
.full-bleed-feature {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(246,241,232,0.94), rgba(246,241,232,0.78)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  padding-top: clamp(2.3rem, 4vw, 4rem);
}

.feature-title-wrap {
  margin-bottom: clamp(1.15rem, 2.2vw, 1.7rem);
}

.feature-title {
  background: var(--green-dark);
  color: var(--cream);
  border: 1px solid rgba(217,154,39,0.35);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.feature-title::before {
  border-left-color: var(--ochre);
  background:
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      135deg,
      rgba(246,241,232,0.96) 0 3px,
      transparent 3px 6px
    );
}

.feature-band {
  min-height: clamp(360px, 35vw, 520px);
  border-top: 1px solid rgba(46,59,36,0.18);
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(46,59,36,0.18);
}

.feature-photo,
.feature-panel {
  min-height: clamp(360px, 35vw, 520px);
}

.feature-photo {
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.96), rgba(98,106,56,0.78)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
}

.feature-photo::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.10), rgba(46,59,36,0.24));
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 2;
}

.feature-photo img {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  filter: saturate(0.92) contrast(1.06);
}

.feature-photo.image-missing {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  padding: 1.15rem;
}

.feature-photo.image-missing::before {
  content: attr(data-label);
  position: relative;
  z-index: 3;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.92);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.feature-panel {
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: clamp(1.15rem, 2.2vw, 1.9rem);
}

.feature-panel-green {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green), #4f5b33);
}

.feature-panel-deep {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--green-dark), #41502f);
}

.feature-panel-ochre {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8b641a, var(--red-dark));
}

.feature-panel h3 {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0.48rem 0.72rem;
  background: var(--red-dark);
  color: var(--cream);
  border-left: 5px solid var(--ochre);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
}

.feature-panel p {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.55vw, 1.36rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.035em;
  max-width: 17rem;
  overflow-wrap: break-word;
  hyphens: auto;
}

/* Demais seções na mesma linguagem visual */
.method-river {
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20);
}

.method-step {
  min-height: 250px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.method-step p {
  font-size: 0.88rem !important;
}

.impact-card,
.expedition-preview-card,
.media-panel,
.researcher-card {
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.94), rgba(246,241,232,0.78));
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18);
}

.empty-media {
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(215,221,197,0.36), rgba(255,253,247,0.78));
  border: 1px dashed rgba(98,106,56,0.42);
  color: var(--green-dark);
  border-radius: 16px;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  .about-intro-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(390px, 0.68fr);
  }

  .about-display-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 4.7vw, 4.4rem);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  .about-intro-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .about-stat-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  .about-stat {
    min-height: 118px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .feature-band {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .feature-photo,
  .feature-panel {
    min-height: 300px;
  }

  .feature-panel p {
    max-width: 100%;
    font-size: 1.26rem !important;
  }

  .about-stat-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 520px) {
  .about-stat-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}


/* ===== Expansão da foto lateral da seção O projeto ===== */
#o-projeto.about-section {
  width: min(1280px, calc(100vw - 1.25rem));
}

#o-projeto .about-intro-grid {
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 0.96fr) minmax(500px, 0.78fr);
  gap: clamp(1.8rem, 3.2vw, 3rem);
  align-items: start;
}

#o-projeto .about-map-stack {
  gap: 1rem;
}

#o-projeto .about-map-stack .project-map-card {
  border-radius: 24px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded {
  margin-top: 0;
  min-height: clamp(560px, 58vw, 760px);
  border-radius: 30px;
  isolation: isolate;
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  z-index: 2;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(23,23,23,0.18) 0%, rgba(23,23,23,0.02) 42%, rgba(23,23,23,0.74) 100%),
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.28), rgba(46,59,36,0));
  pointer-events: none;
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
  min-height: clamp(560px, 58vw, 760px);
  height: clamp(560px, 58vw, 760px);
  object-position: center top;
  transform: scale(1.015);
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded figcaption {
  z-index: 4;
  left: 1.05rem;
  right: 1.05rem;
  bottom: 1.05rem;
  width: auto;
  background: rgba(23,23,23,0.62);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,253,247,0.16);
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 5;
  top: 1rem;
  left: 1rem;
  right: 1rem;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 0.55rem;
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat {
  min-height: 112px;
  padding: 0.7rem 0.68rem;
  border-radius: 18px;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.88), rgba(98,106,56,0.78)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png");
  background-size: cover;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,253,247,0.18);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.22);
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat strong {
  font-size: clamp(1.55rem, 2.35vw, 2.45rem);
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat span {
  font-size: clamp(0.48rem, 0.52vw, 0.58rem);
  line-height: 1.22;
  letter-spacing: 0.055em;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  #o-projeto .about-intro-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(460px, 0.78fr);
  }

  #o-projeto .about-stat-overlay {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  #o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat {
    min-height: 104px;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  #o-projeto .about-intro-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded,
  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
    min-height: clamp(480px, 80vw, 620px);
    height: clamp(480px, 80vw, 620px);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  #o-projeto .about-stat-overlay {
    position: relative;
    top: auto;
    left: auto;
    right: auto;
    z-index: 6;
    margin: -0.75rem 0.85rem 0.85rem 0.85rem;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    min-height: 0;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded::before {
    bottom: 0;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
    min-height: 390px;
    height: 390px;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded figcaption {
    position: relative;
    left: auto;
    right: auto;
    bottom: auto;
    margin: 0.85rem;
  }
}

</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  /* Destaque automático da navbar */
  const sections = document.querySelectorAll("section[id]");
  const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".navbar a[href*='#']");

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          const id = entry.target.id;

          navLinks.forEach(link => {
            link.classList.remove("active-section");
            const href = link.getAttribute("href");
            if (href && href.endsWith("#" + id)) {
              link.classList.add("active-section");
            }
          });
        }
      });
    },
    {
      root: null,
      rootMargin: "-35% 0px -55% 0px",
      threshold: 0
    }
  );

  sections.forEach(section => {
    if (section.id) observer.observe(section);
  });

  /* Vídeo da hero: autoplay robusto + botão play/pause sem caracteres quebrados */
  const video = document.querySelector(".hero-video");
  const toggle = document.querySelector(".hero-video-toggle");

  if (video) {
    video.muted = true;
    video.defaultMuted = true;
    video.playsInline = true;
    video.setAttribute("muted", "");
    video.setAttribute("playsinline", "");
    video.setAttribute("autoplay", "");

    const updateHeroVideoButton = function () {
      if (!toggle) return;
      const isPaused = video.paused || video.ended;
      toggle.classList.toggle("is-paused", isPaused);
      toggle.setAttribute("aria-label", isPaused ? "Reproduzir vídeo" : "Pausar vídeo");
      toggle.setAttribute("aria-pressed", isPaused ? "true" : "false");
    };

    const startHeroVideo = function () {
      if (video.dataset.userPaused === "1") {
        updateHeroVideoButton();
        return;
      }

      const playPromise = video.play();
      if (playPromise && typeof playPromise.then === "function") {
        playPromise.then(updateHeroVideoButton).catch(updateHeroVideoButton);
      } else {
        updateHeroVideoButton();
      }
    };

    startHeroVideo();
    window.addEventListener("load", startHeroVideo, { once: true });
    window.addEventListener("pageshow", startHeroVideo);

    document.addEventListener("visibilitychange", function () {
      if (!document.hidden) startHeroVideo();
    });

    video.addEventListener("play", updateHeroVideoButton);
    video.addEventListener("pause", updateHeroVideoButton);

    if (toggle) {
      updateHeroVideoButton();
      toggle.addEventListener("click", function () {
        if (video.paused) {
          delete video.dataset.userPaused;
          startHeroVideo();
        } else {
          video.dataset.userPaused = "1";
          video.pause();
          updateHeroVideoButton();
        }
      });
    }
  }

  /* Carrossel principal dos objetivos */
  const objectiveSlides = document.querySelectorAll(".objective-slide");
  const objectiveDots = document.querySelectorAll(".objective-dot");
  const objectivePrev = document.querySelector(".objective-prev");
  const objectiveNext = document.querySelector(".objective-next");
  const objectivesSection = document.getElementById("objetivos");

  let objectiveIndex = 0;
  let objectiveTimer = null;
  let objectiveAutoplayStarted = false;

  function showObjectiveSlide(index) {
    if (!objectiveSlides.length) return;

    objectiveIndex = (index + objectiveSlides.length) % objectiveSlides.length;

    objectiveSlides.forEach((slide, i) => {
      slide.classList.toggle("active", i === objectiveIndex);
    });

    objectiveDots.forEach((dot, i) => {
      dot.classList.toggle("active", i === objectiveIndex);
    });

    resetObjectivePhotoCarousel(objectiveSlides[objectiveIndex]);
  }

  function restartObjectiveTimer() {
    if (objectiveTimer) clearInterval(objectiveTimer);

    objectiveTimer = setInterval(function () {
      showObjectiveSlide(objectiveIndex + 1);
    }, 9000);
  }

  if (objectiveSlides.length) {
    const startObjectiveAutoplay = function () {
      if (objectiveAutoplayStarted) return;
      objectiveAutoplayStarted = true;
      restartObjectiveTimer();
    };

    showObjectiveSlide(0);

    if (objectivePrev) {
      objectivePrev.addEventListener("click", function () {
        showObjectiveSlide(objectiveIndex - 1);
        startObjectiveAutoplay();
        restartObjectiveTimer();
      });
    }

    if (objectiveNext) {
      objectiveNext.addEventListener("click", function () {
        showObjectiveSlide(objectiveIndex + 1);
        startObjectiveAutoplay();
        restartObjectiveTimer();
      });
    }

    objectiveDots.forEach((dot, i) => {
      dot.addEventListener("click", function () {
        showObjectiveSlide(i);
        startObjectiveAutoplay();
        restartObjectiveTimer();
      });
    });

    if (objectivesSection && "IntersectionObserver" in window) {
      const objectiveObserver = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
          if (entry.isIntersecting) {
            showObjectiveSlide(0);
            startObjectiveAutoplay();
            objectiveObserver.disconnect();
          }
        });
      }, {
        threshold: 0.35,
        rootMargin: "0px 0px -10% 0px"
      });

      objectiveObserver.observe(objectivesSection);
    } else {
      startObjectiveAutoplay();
    }
  }

  /* Carrossel interno de fotos de cada objetivo */
  function resetObjectivePhotoCarousel(slide) {
    if (!slide) return;

    const photos = slide.querySelectorAll(".objective-photo-slide");
    const photoDots = slide.querySelectorAll(".objective-photo-dot");

    photos.forEach((photo, i) => {
      photo.classList.toggle("active", i === 0);
    });

    photoDots.forEach((dot, i) => {
      dot.classList.toggle("active", i === 0);
    });

    slide.dataset.photoIndex = "0";
  }

  function showObjectivePhoto(slide, index) {
    const photos = slide.querySelectorAll(".objective-photo-slide");
    const photoDots = slide.querySelectorAll(".objective-photo-dot");

    if (!photos.length) return;

    const nextIndex = (index + photos.length) % photos.length;
    slide.dataset.photoIndex = String(nextIndex);

    photos.forEach((photo, i) => {
      photo.classList.toggle("active", i === nextIndex);
    });

    photoDots.forEach((dot, i) => {
      dot.classList.toggle("active", i === nextIndex);
    });
  }

  document.querySelectorAll(".objective-slide").forEach(slide => {
    const photoPrev = slide.querySelector(".objective-photo-prev");
    const photoNext = slide.querySelector(".objective-photo-next");
    const photoDots = slide.querySelectorAll(".objective-photo-dot");

    slide.dataset.photoIndex = "0";

    if (photoPrev) {
      photoPrev.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        const current = Number(slide.dataset.photoIndex || 0);
        showObjectivePhoto(slide, current - 1);
      });
    }

    if (photoNext) {
      photoNext.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        const current = Number(slide.dataset.photoIndex || 0);
        showObjectivePhoto(slide, current + 1);
      });
    }

    photoDots.forEach((dot, i) => {
      dot.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        showObjectivePhoto(slide, i);
      });
    });
  });

  setInterval(function () {
    const activeSlide = document.querySelector(".objective-slide.active");
    if (!activeSlide) return;

    const current = Number(activeSlide.dataset.photoIndex || 0);
    showObjectivePhoto(activeSlide, current + 1);
  }, 3500);
  /* Mapa do município de São Gabriel da Cachoeira na seção O projeto */
  const projectMapEl = document.getElementById("project-sgc-map");

  if (projectMapEl && typeof L !== "undefined") {
    const projectMap = L.map("project-sgc-map", {
      zoomControl: false,
      scrollWheelZoom: false,
      dragging: true,
      attributionControl: false
    });

L.tileLayer(
  "https://server.arcgisonline.com/ArcGIS/rest/services/World_Imagery/MapServer/tile/{z}/{y}/{x}",
  {
    maxZoom: 18
  }
).addTo(projectMap);

    fetch("_input_data/limites/sao_gabriel_da_cachoeira.geojson")
      .then(response => {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("GeoJSON não encontrado");
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(geojson => {
        const sgcLayer = L.geoJSON(geojson, {
          style: {
            color: "#A93632",
            weight: 3,
            opacity: 1,
            fillColor: "#626A38",
            fillOpacity: 0.18
          }
        }).addTo(projectMap);

        projectMap.fitBounds(sgcLayer.getBounds(), {
          padding: [18, 18]
        });

        L.control.zoom({
          position: "bottomright"
        }).addTo(projectMap);
      })
      .catch(error => {
        projectMapEl.innerHTML =
          '<div style="padding:1rem;font-family:Montserrat,Arial,sans-serif;font-size:0.85rem;color:#2E3B24;">Não foi possível carregar o limite municipal. Confira se o arquivo <strong>_input_data/limites/sao_gabriel_da_cachoeira.geojson</strong> existe.</div>';
      });
  }
});

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const revealTargets = document.querySelectorAll(
    ".content-card, .objectives-section, .full-bleed-feature"
  );

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index, 6) * 55}ms`);
  });

  if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
    return;
  }

  const revealObserver = new IntersectionObserver(
    entries => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
          revealObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    },
    {
      threshold: 0.12,
      rootMargin: "0px 0px -8% 0px"
    }
  );

  revealTargets.forEach(el => revealObserver.observe(el));
});

</script>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===== Ajuste responsivo final — abertura O projeto e eixos ===== */
#o-projeto.content-card,
#o-projeto.about-section {
  container-type: inline-size;
  container-name: projetoAbout;
  width: min(1320px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 4vw, 4rem))) !important;
  max-width: 1320px !important;
  margin-inline: auto !important;
  padding-inline: clamp(1.05rem, 3vw, 3rem) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-hero-grid {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.08fr) minmax(0, 0.92fr) !important;
  grid-template-areas: "copy visual" !important;
  gap: clamp(1.35rem, 3.2vw, 3.2rem) !important;
  align-items: start !important;
  width: 100% !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-copy-editorial {
  grid-area: copy !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  justify-self: stretch !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-copy-editorial > * {
  margin-left: 0 !important;
  margin-right: 0 !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-display-title {
  max-width: 900px !important;
  font-size: clamp(3.1rem, 6.2vw, 6.35rem) !important;
  line-height: 0.89 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.082em !important;
  text-wrap: balance;
}

#o-projeto .lead,
#o-projeto .about-copy-columns,
#o-projeto .about-pullquote {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 900px !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-copy-columns {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(1rem, 2.2vw, 1.8rem) !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-visual-module {
  grid-area: visual !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: auto auto !important;
  gap: 1rem !important;
  align-self: stretch !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded {
  width: 100% !important;
  min-height: clamp(560px, 52vw, 760px) !important;
  height: auto !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  border-radius: clamp(22px, 2vw, 32px) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
  width: 100% !important;
  min-height: clamp(560px, 52vw, 760px) !important;
  height: clamp(560px, 52vw, 760px) !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay {
  position: absolute !important;
  top: clamp(0.7rem, 1.3vw, 1.1rem) !important;
  left: clamp(0.7rem, 1.3vw, 1.1rem) !important;
  right: auto !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  width: min(310px, calc(100% - 1.4rem)) !important;
  max-width: 310px !important;
  gap: clamp(0.45rem, 0.9vw, 0.68rem) !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat {
  min-height: clamp(92px, 9vw, 112px) !important;
  padding: clamp(0.55rem, 1vw, 0.75rem) !important;
  border-radius: 17px !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat strong {
  font-size: clamp(1.9rem, 3.2vw, 2.85rem) !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat span {
  font-size: clamp(0.48rem, 0.62vw, 0.62rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.22 !important;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-map-compact {
  width: 100% !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

#o-projeto .about-map-compact #project-sgc-map {
  height: clamp(210px, 24vw, 285px) !important;
  min-height: 210px !important;
}

@container projetoAbout (max-width: 1040px) {
  #o-projeto .about-hero-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    grid-template-areas:
      "copy"
      "visual" !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-copy-editorial,
  #o-projeto .about-visual-module,
  #o-projeto .lead,
  #o-projeto .about-copy-columns,
  #o-projeto .about-pullquote {
    max-width: none !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-display-title {
    max-width: 760px !important;
    font-size: clamp(2.85rem, 9vw, 5.4rem) !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-visual-module {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) minmax(260px, 0.58fr) !important;
    grid-template-rows: none !important;
    align-items: stretch !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded,
  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
    min-height: clamp(460px, 58vw, 620px) !important;
    height: clamp(460px, 58vw, 620px) !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-map-compact {
    height: 100% !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-map-compact #project-sgc-map {
    height: calc(100% - 112px) !important;
    min-height: 300px !important;
  }
}

@container projetoAbout (max-width: 760px) {
  #o-projeto.content-card,
  #o-projeto.about-section {
    width: min(100%, calc(100vw - 1rem)) !important;
    padding: 1.2rem 1rem 1.35rem !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 42px 1fr !important;
    gap: 0.55rem !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-display-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.55rem, 13vw, 4.2rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.91 !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-copy-columns {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-visual-module {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded,
  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
    min-height: clamp(430px, 88vw, 560px) !important;
    height: clamp(430px, 88vw, 560px) !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-map-compact #project-sgc-map {
    height: 255px !important;
    min-height: 255px !important;
  }
}

@container projetoAbout (max-width: 520px) {
  #o-projeto .about-pullquote {
    font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 5.4vw, 1.35rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.34 !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded {
    display: flex !important;
    flex-direction: column !important;
    min-height: 0 !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded img {
    min-height: 390px !important;
    height: 390px !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-stat-overlay {
    position: relative !important;
    top: auto !important;
    left: auto !important;
    right: auto !important;
    width: auto !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: -0.85rem 0.75rem 0.75rem !important;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-stat-overlay .about-stat {
    min-height: 88px !important;
  }

  #o-projeto .about-photo-expanded figcaption {
    position: relative !important;
    left: auto !important;
    right: auto !important;
    bottom: auto !important;
    max-width: none !important;
    margin: 0 0.75rem 0.75rem !important;
  }
}

/* Fallback para navegadores sem container queries */
@media (max-width: 1040px) {
  #o-projeto .about-hero-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    grid-template-areas:
      "copy"
      "visual" !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  #o-projeto .about-visual-module,
  #o-projeto .about-copy-columns {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }
}

/* Três eixos: melhora leitura em desktop, tablet e mobile */
#frentes-integradas .feature-title-wrap {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  flex-wrap: wrap !important;
  gap: 0.7rem !important;
  width: min(1320px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 4vw, 4rem))) !important;
}

#frentes-integradas .feature-title {
  max-width: 100% !important;
  white-space: normal !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.65rem, 4.4vw, 3.15rem) !important;
  line-height: 0.98 !important;
}

#frentes-integradas .feature-band {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
}

#frentes-integradas .feature-photo,
#frentes-integradas .feature-panel {
  min-height: clamp(390px, 36vw, 560px) !important;
}

#frentes-integradas .feature-panel p.axis-title {
  font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1.55vw, 1.55rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
}

#frentes-integradas .feature-panel p.axis-detail {
  font-size: clamp(0.76rem, 0.85vw, 0.92rem) !important;
}

@media (max-width: 1220px) {
  #frentes-integradas .feature-band {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  #frentes-integradas .feature-title-wrap {
    display: grid !important;
    gap: 0.65rem !important;
  }

  #frentes-integradas .feature-band {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  #frentes-integradas .feature-photo,
  #frentes-integradas .feature-panel {
    min-height: 310px !important;
  }

  #frentes-integradas .feature-panel p.axis-title,
  #frentes-integradas .feature-panel p.axis-detail {
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* ===== Ajuste fino da abertura: evita que o título invada a foto ===== */
#o-projeto .about-hero-grid {
```
