```{=html}
    ".method-step",
    ".impact-card",
    ".objective-slide.active .objective-text",
    ".objective-slide.active .objective-image-wrap",
    "#expedicoes-recentes .lead",
    "#divulgacao .lead",
    ".media-panel",
    ".researchers-copy",
    ".researcher-card"
  ];

  const revealTargets = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(selectors.join(",")))
    .filter(el => !el.classList.contains("reveal-ready"));

  revealTargets.forEach((el, index) => {
    el.classList.add("reveal-ready");
    el.style.setProperty("--reveal-delay", `${Math.min(index % 8, 7) * 45}ms`);
  });

  if (window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) {
    revealTargets.forEach(el => el.classList.add("is-visible"));
    return;
  }

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        entry.target.classList.add("is-visible");
        observer.unobserve(entry.target);
      }
    });
  }, {
    threshold: 0.08,
    rootMargin: "0px 0px -6% 0px"
  });

  revealTargets.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
});
</script>

<style>
/* ===== Divulgação full-width com prévias horizontais ===== */
#divulgacao.content-card {
  width: min(1520px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 3.8vw, 4rem))) !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  padding: clamp(1.45rem, 3vw, 2.9rem) clamp(1rem, 3vw, 3rem) clamp(1.6rem, 3.2vw, 3.2rem) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#divulgacao .section-title,
#divulgacao .lead {
  max-width: 1180px !important;
}

#divulgacao .lead {
  margin-bottom: clamp(1.2rem, 2.5vw, 2rem) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-layout {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  gap: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.45rem) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel {
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 0.23fr) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  gap: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.6rem) !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
  padding: clamp(0.85rem, 1.8vw, 1.25rem) !important;
  border-radius: 24px !important;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.98), rgba(246,241,232,0.82)) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.075) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel-header {
  margin: 0 !important;
  min-height: 100% !important;
  align-self: stretch !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  justify-content: space-between !important;
  align-items: flex-start !important;
  gap: 1.2rem !important;
  padding: clamp(0.95rem, 1.7vw, 1.25rem) !important;
  border-radius: 18px !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.98), rgba(98,106,56,0.95)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png") !important;
  background-size: cover !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel-header::after {
  content: "prévia atualizada";
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.62);
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace;
  font-size: 0.62rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 1.25;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel h3 {
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.72rem, 0.9vw, 0.86rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.35 !important;
  max-width: 11rem;
}

#divulgacao .media-panel-label {
  order: -1;
  background: var(--red) !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.68rem !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-grid {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)) !important;
  gap: clamp(0.85rem, 1.5vw, 1.15rem) !important;
  align-items: stretch !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-item {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: clamp(210px, 17vw, 260px) !important;
  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(170px, 42%) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  border-radius: 20px !important;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.98) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.055) !important;
  transition: transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease;
}

#divulgacao .media-item:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.10) !important;
  border-color: rgba(169,54,50,0.26) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-thumb {
  position: relative !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  min-height: 100% !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.94), rgba(98,106,56,0.78)),
    url("figures/tsiino_bg.png") !important;
  background-size: cover !important;
  color: rgba(255,253,247,0.82) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: 0.7rem !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-thumb::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.04), rgba(0,0,0,0.20));
  pointer-events: none;
}

#divulgacao .media-thumb img {
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  min-height: 100% !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  display: block !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-item-instagram .media-thumb img {
  transform: scale(1.08);
}

#divulgacao .media-body {
  padding: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 1.35rem) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-date {
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem !important;
  color: var(--red) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.75vw, 0.74rem) !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-body h4 {
  font-size: clamp(1.02rem, 1.35vw, 1.32rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.025em !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 4 !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-body p {
  font-size: clamp(0.86rem, 0.9vw, 0.96rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.48 !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 3 !important;
}

#divulgacao .media-link {
  align-self: flex-start;
  margin-top: auto !important;
  padding-top: 0.3rem;
}

#divulgacao .empty-media {
  min-height: 160px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
}

@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  #divulgacao .media-panel {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel-header {
    min-height: auto !important;
    flex-direction: row !important;
    align-items: center !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel-header::after {
    margin-left: auto;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 980px) {
  #divulgacao.content-card {
    width: min(100%, calc(100vw - 1rem)) !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-item {
    min-height: 220px !important;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(180px, 38%) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  }
}

@media (max-width: 680px) {
  #divulgacao.content-card {
    padding: 1.2rem 0.95rem 1.35rem !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .section-title {
    grid-template-columns: 42px 1fr !important;
    gap: 0.55rem !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel {
    border-radius: 20px !important;
    padding: 0.75rem !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel-header {
    flex-wrap: wrap !important;
    gap: 0.65rem !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-panel-header::after {
    display: none;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    min-height: auto !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-thumb {
    min-height: 230px !important;
    height: 230px !important;
  }

  #divulgacao .media-body h4 {
    -webkit-line-clamp: 3 !important;
  }
}
</style>

<section id="divulgacao" class="content-card">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Projeto Tsiino Hiiwiida na mídia</h2>
  </div>
```

```{r divulgacao-dinamica}
library(htmltools)
library(rvest)
library(xml2)

get_meta_content <- function(doc, selectors) {
  for (selector in selectors) {
    value <- doc |> html_element(selector) |> html_attr("content")
    if (!is.na(value) && nzchar(trimws(value))) return(trimws(value))
  }
  ""
}

fetch_link_preview <- function(url) {
  empty <- list(titulo = "", descricao = "", imagem = "")
  if (!nz(url) || url == "#") return(empty)
  tryCatch({
    doc <- read_html(url)
    titulo <- get_meta_content(doc, c("meta[property='og:title']", "meta[name='twitter:title']"))
    if (!nz(titulo)) titulo <- doc |> html_element("title") |> html_text2()
    descricao <- get_meta_content(doc, c("meta[property='og:description']", "meta[name='twitter:description']", "meta[name='description']"))
    imagem <- get_meta_content(doc, c("meta[property='og:image']", "meta[property='og:image:secure_url']", "meta[name='twitter:image']"))
    if (nz(imagem)) imagem <- xml2::url_absolute(imagem, url)
    list(titulo = ifelse(is.na(titulo), "", titulo), descricao = ifelse(is.na(descricao), "", descricao), imagem = ifelse(is.na(imagem), "", imagem))
  }, error = function(e) empty)
}

read_media_csv <- function(rel_path, tipo) {
  data <- read_optional_csv(rel_path)
  if (nrow(data) == 0) return(data.frame())
  data.frame(
    tipo = rep(tipo, nrow(data)),
    url = col_or(data, c("url", "link", "href"), "#"),
    titulo = col_or(data, c("titulo", "título", "title", "post"), ""),
    imagem = col_or(data, c("imagem", "image", "thumb", "thumbnail", "capa"), ""),
    descricao = col_or(data, c("descricao", "descrição", "resumo", "caption", "texto"), ""),
    data_item = col_or(data, c("data", "date", "ano"), ""),
    veiculo = col_or(data, c("veiculo", "veículo", "fonte", "source"), ""),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

media_items <- do.call(rbind, Filter(function(x) nrow(x) > 0, list(
  read_media_csv(file.path("_input_data", "divulgacao_instagram.csv"), "instagram"),
  read_media_csv(file.path("_input_data", "divulgacao_reportagens.csv"), "reportagem"),
  read_media_csv(file.path("_input_data", "divulgacao_youtube.csv"), "youtube")
)))

if (is.null(media_items) || nrow(media_items) == 0) {
  tags$div(class = "empty-media divulg-empty-media", "Nenhum item encontrado nos CSVs de divulgação. Ao adicionar linhas em _input_data/divulgacao_instagram.csv, _input_data/divulgacao_reportagens.csv ou _input_data/divulgacao_youtube.csv e renderizar o site novamente, o carrossel aparecerá aqui.")
} else {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(media_items))) {
    preview <- fetch_link_preview(media_items$url[i])
    if (!nz(media_items$titulo[i])) media_items$titulo[i] <- preview$titulo
    if (!nz(media_items$descricao[i])) media_items$descricao[i] <- preview$descricao
    if (!nz(media_items$imagem[i])) media_items$imagem[i] <- preview$imagem
  }
  media_items$titulo[!nz(media_items$titulo)] <- "Projeto Tsiino Hiiwiida"
  parsed_dates <- suppressWarnings(as.Date(media_items$data_item))
  order_key <- ifelse(is.na(parsed_dates), as.Date("1900-01-01"), parsed_dates)
  media_items <- media_items[order(order_key, seq_len(nrow(media_items)), decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]

  make_slide <- function(i) {
    tipo <- media_items$tipo[i]
    tipo_label <- switch(tipo, instagram = "Instagram", reportagem = "Reportagem", youtube = "YouTube", "Mídia")
    link_label <- switch(tipo, instagram = "Ver Instagram →", reportagem = "Ler reportagem →", youtube = "Ver YouTube →", "Abrir link →")
    slide_class <- paste("carousel-slide", paste0("carousel-slide-", tipo), if (identical(tipo, "youtube")) "is-video" else "")
    thumb <- if (nz(media_items$imagem[i])) tags$div(class = "carousel-thumb", tags$img(src = media_items$imagem[i], alt = media_items$titulo[i], loading = "lazy")) else tags$div(class = "carousel-thumb carousel-thumb-fallback", tipo_label)
    tags$article(
      class = slide_class,
      thumb,
      if (identical(tipo, "youtube")) tags$div(class = "carousel-play-icon", "▶"),
      tags$div(
        class = "carousel-body",
        tags$span(class = paste("carousel-type-pill", if (identical(tipo, "reportagem")) "is-reportagem" else ""), tipo_label),
        if (nz(media_items$data_item[i])) tags$span(class = "carousel-date", media_items$data_item[i]),
        tags$p(class = "carousel-title", media_items$titulo[i]),
        if (nz(media_items$descricao[i])) tags$p(class = "carousel-description", media_items$descricao[i]),
        tags$a(class = "carousel-link", href = media_items$url[i], target = "_blank", rel = "noopener", link_label)
      )
    )
  }

  tagList(
    tags$div(
      class = "divulg-carousel-wrapper",
      `aria-label` = "Carrossel de divulgação",
      tags$button(class = "divulg-arrow divulg-prev", type = "button", `aria-label` = "Item anterior", "‹"),
      tags$div(class = "divulg-track-container", tags$div(class = "divulg-track", id = "divulg-track", lapply(seq_len(nrow(media_items)), make_slide))),
      tags$button(class = "divulg-arrow divulg-next", type = "button", `aria-label` = "Próximo item", "›"),
      tags$div(class = "divulg-dots", id = "divulg-dots", `aria-label` = "Navegação do carrossel")
    )
  )
}
```

```{=html}
</section>

<script>
(function(){
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function(){
    const track = document.getElementById("divulg-track");
    const dots = document.getElementById("divulg-dots");
    const wrapper = document.querySelector(".divulg-carousel-wrapper");
    if(!track || !dots || !wrapper) return;
    const slides = Array.from(track.querySelectorAll(".carousel-slide"));
    if(!slides.length) return;
    const perView = () => window.innerWidth <= 560 ? 1 : window.innerWidth <= 900 ? 2 : 3;
    let current = 0, timer = null;
    const totalGroups = () => Math.max(1, Math.ceil(slides.length / perView()));
    function buildDots(){
      dots.innerHTML = "";
      for(let i = 0; i < totalGroups(); i++){
        const btn = document.createElement("button");
        btn.type = "button";
        btn.className = "divulg-dot" + (i === current ? " active" : "");
        btn.setAttribute("aria-label", "Grupo " + (i + 1));
        btn.addEventListener("click", () => goTo(i, true));
        dots.appendChild(btn);
      }
    }
    function updateDots(){
      Array.from(dots.querySelectorAll(".divulg-dot")).forEach((d,i) => d.classList.toggle("active", i === current));
    }
    function goTo(index, resetTimer){
      const total = totalGroups();
      current = (index + total) % total;
      const slideWidth = slides[0].getBoundingClientRect().width;
      const gap = parseFloat(getComputedStyle(track).columnGap || getComputedStyle(track).gap || 0) || 0;
      track.style.transform = `translateX(-${current * perView() * (slideWidth + gap)}px)`;
      updateDots();
      if(resetTimer) restartAuto();
    }
    function stopAuto(){ if(timer) window.clearInterval(timer); timer = null; }
    function startAuto(){
      stopAuto();
      if(totalGroups() > 1 && !window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches){ timer = window.setInterval(() => goTo(current + 1, false), 5200); }
    }
    function restartAuto(){ stopAuto(); startAuto(); }
    document.querySelector(".divulg-prev")?.addEventListener("click", () => goTo(current - 1, true));
    document.querySelector(".divulg-next")?.addEventListener("click", () => goTo(current + 1, true));
    wrapper.addEventListener("mouseenter", stopAuto);
    wrapper.addEventListener("mouseleave", startAuto);
    wrapper.addEventListener("focusin", stopAuto);
    wrapper.addEventListener("focusout", startAuto);
    window.addEventListener("resize", () => { current = 0; buildDots(); goTo(0, false); restartAuto(); });
    buildDots(); goTo(0, false); startAuto();
  });
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<section id="pesquisadores-responsaveis" class="content-card researchers-section">
  <div class="section-title">
    <h2>Rede de coordenação científica</h2>
  </div>

  <div class="researchers-layout">
    <div class="researchers-copy">
      <div class="researchers-kicker">Rede de coordenação científica</div>

      <p class="lead researchers-lead">
        O projeto é coordenado por uma rede multidisciplinar vinculada a instituições amazônicas, centros de pesquisa de outros estados brasileiros e parceiros do Reino Unido.
      </p>

      <p>
        A rede combina taxonomia, sistemática, bioinformática, micologia, briologia, florística, química de solos, comunicação científica, audiovisual e colaboração com parataxonomistas e representantes indígenas.
      </p>

      <div class="researchers-summary">
        <div>
          <span class="researchers-number">30</span>
          <span class="researchers-label">instituições articuladas</span>
        </div>

        <div>
          <span class="researchers-number">66</span>
          <span class="researchers-label">pesquisadores, estudantes e equipe técnica</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="hero-actions researchers-actions">
        <a class="btn-main" href="team/">Conhecer a equipe completa</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="researchers-panel">
      <div class="researchers-panel-header">
        <h3></h3>
      </div>

      <div class="researchers-list">
        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPEAM</span>
          <h4>Charles Zartman</h4>
          <p>Instituto Nacional de Pesquisas da Amazônia — INPA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPERJ</span>
          <h4>Domingos Cardoso</h4>
          <p>Jardim Botânico do Rio de Janeiro — JBRJ</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">UKRI</span>
          <h4>Sandra Diane Knapp</h4>
          <p>Natural History Museum</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESPA</span>
          <h4>Anna Luiza Ilkiu-Borges</h4>
          <p>Museu Paraense Emílio Goeldi — MPEG</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FACEPE</span>
          <h4>Clistenes Williams Araújo do Nascimento</h4>
          <p>Universidade Federal Rural de Pernambuco — UFRPE</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPEMA</span>
          <h4>Dirce Komura</h4>
          <p>Instituto Federal do Maranhão — IFMA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESP</span>
          <h4>Denilson Fernandes Peralta</h4>
          <p>Instituto de Pesquisas Ambientais — IPA</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPESQ</span>
          <h4>Felipe Wartchow</h4>
          <p>Universidade Federal da Paraíba — UFPB</p>
        </article>

        <article class="researcher-card">
          <span class="agency-pill">FAPDF</span>
          <h4>Micheline Carvalho-Silva</h4>
          <p>Universidade de Brasília — UnB</p>
        </article>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{r instituicoes-projeto, results='asis'}
library(htmltools)

inst_path <- find_up(file.path("_input_data", "institutions.yml"))

as_chr <- function(x, default = "") {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0 || all(is.na(x))) return(default)
  x <- as.character(x[[1]])
  if (is.na(x) || !nzchar(trimws(x))) default else x
}

as_int <- function(x, default = 999L) {
  out <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(as_chr(x, as.character(default))))
  if (is.na(out)) default else out
}

read_institutions_yml <- function(path) {
  if (is.na(path) || !file.exists(path)) return(data.frame())
  if (!requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) return(data.frame())
  raw <- yaml::read_yaml(path)
  if (length(raw) == 0) return(data.frame())
  rows <- lapply(seq_along(raw), function(i) {
    item <- raw[[i]]
    data.frame(
      id = as_chr(item$id, paste0("inst_", i)),
      group = as_chr(item$group, "parceira"),
      order = as_int(item$order, i),
      acronym = as_chr(item$acronym, as_chr(item$id, paste0("INST ", i))),
      name = as_chr(item$name, as_chr(item$acronym, "Instituição")),
      role = as_chr(item$role, "Instituição"),
      url = as_chr(item$url, ""),
      logo = as_chr(item$logo, ""),
      status = as_chr(item$status, ""),
      note = as_chr(item$note, ""),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  })
  do.call(rbind, rows)
}

institutions <- read_institutions_yml(inst_path)

if (nrow(institutions) == 0) {
  tags$section(id = "logos-institucionais", class = "logos-strip", `aria-label` = "Logos institucionais", tags$div(class = "empty-media", "Nenhum cadastro institucional foi encontrado em _input_data/institutions.yml."))
} else {
  institutions <- institutions[order(match(institutions$group, c("fomento", "participante", "parceira")), institutions$order, institutions$name), , drop = FALSE]
  fomento_data <- institutions[institutions$group == "fomento", , drop = FALSE]
  cnpq_row <- institutions[institutions$id == "cnpq", , drop = FALSE]
  fomento_display <- unique(rbind(fomento_data, cnpq_row))
  participante_data <- institutions[institutions$group == "participante", , drop = FALSE]
  parceira_data <- institutions[institutions$group == "parceira" & institutions$id != "cnpq", , drop = FALSE]

  make_logo_item <- function(data, i) {
    content <- list(
      if (nz(data$logo[i])) tags$img(src = data$logo[i], alt = paste("Logo", data$acronym[i]), loading = "lazy", onerror = "this.style.display='none'; this.parentElement.classList.add('logo-missing');"),
      tags$span(class = "logo-fallback", data$acronym[i])
    )
    if (nz(data$url[i]) && grepl("^https?://", data$url[i])) {
      tags$a(href = data$url[i], target = "_blank", rel = "noopener", class = "logo-item", `aria-label` = paste(data$acronym[i], "—", data$name[i]), content)
    } else {
      tags$span(class = "logo-item", `aria-label` = paste(data$acronym[i], "—", data$name[i]), content)
    }
  }

  make_logo_group <- function(title, data) {
    tags$div(
      class = "logos-group",
      tags$h3(class = "logos-group-title", title),
      if (nrow(data) == 0) tags$div(class = "empty-media", "Nenhuma instituição cadastrada neste grupo.") else tags$div(class = "logos-row", lapply(seq_len(nrow(data)), function(i) make_logo_item(data, i)))
    )
  }

  tags$section(
    id = "logos-institucionais",
    class = "logos-strip",
    `aria-label` = "Logos institucionais",
    make_logo_group("Financiadores", fomento_display),
    make_logo_group("Instituições participantes", participante_data),
    make_logo_group("Instituições parceiras", parceira_data)
  )
}
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* ======================================================================
   Ajustes finos finais — divulgação, instituições e rodapé
   ====================================================================== */
#divulgacao.content-card{position:relative!important;left:50%!important;right:auto!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;width:100vw!important;max-width:100vw!important;min-width:0!important;margin-left:0!important;margin-right:0!important;padding:clamp(2.1rem,4vw,3.4rem) 0 clamp(1.4rem,3vw,2.4rem)!important;background:var(--paper)!important;border-top:0!important;box-shadow:none!important;overflow:hidden!important;box-sizing:border-box!important}
#divulgacao .section-title,#divulgacao .lead{width:min(1520px,calc(100vw - clamp(2rem,8vw,7rem)))!important;max-width:none!important;margin-left:auto!important;margin-right:auto!important;padding-left:0!important;padding-right:0!important}#divulgacao .section-title h2{color:var(--green-dark)!important}
#divulgacao .divulg-carousel-wrapper{position:relative!important;width:100%!important;overflow:hidden!important;padding:0 0 3rem!important;margin-top:clamp(1.1rem,2.4vw,1.9rem)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-track-container{overflow:hidden!important;width:100%!important}#divulgacao .divulg-track{display:flex!important;gap:clamp(1rem,2.2vw,2rem)!important;padding:0 clamp(4.2rem,6vw,6.4rem)!important;transition:transform 420ms cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)!important;will-change:transform!important}
#divulgacao .carousel-slide{flex:0 0 calc((100% - (2 * clamp(1rem,2.2vw,2rem))) / 3)!important;min-width:0!important;position:relative!important;cursor:pointer!important;overflow:hidden!important;border-radius:0!important;background:var(--green)!important;box-shadow:0 16px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.14)!important;aspect-ratio:16/9!important}#divulgacao .carousel-thumb{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;overflow:hidden!important;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(46,59,36,.92),rgba(98,106,56,.76)),url("figures/tsiino_bg.png")!important;background-size:cover!important;color:rgba(255,253,247,.82)!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:.75rem!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:.08em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important}#divulgacao .carousel-thumb img{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;object-fit:cover!important;object-position:center!important;display:block!important;transition:transform 320ms ease!important}#divulgacao .carousel-slide:hover .carousel-thumb img{transform:scale(1.04)!important}
#divulgacao .carousel-play-icon{display:none!important;position:absolute!important;top:50%!important;left:50%!important;transform:translate(-50%,-55%)!important;width:clamp(58px,6vw,82px)!important;height:clamp(58px,6vw,82px)!important;border-radius:50%!important;border:7px solid rgba(255,255,255,.92)!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.22)!important;color:#fff!important;font-size:clamp(1.2rem,2vw,1.8rem)!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;line-height:1!important;pointer-events:none!important;text-indent:.12em!important;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.28)!important}#divulgacao .carousel-slide.is-video .carousel-play-icon{display:flex!important}
#divulgacao .carousel-body{position:absolute!important;inset:auto 0 0 0!important;min-height:56%!important;padding:clamp(1rem,1.8vw,1.55rem)!important;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,.82) 0%,rgba(0,0,0,.44) 58%,rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%)!important;color:#fff!important;display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:flex-end!important;align-items:flex-start!important;gap:.45rem!important}#divulgacao .carousel-type-pill{display:inline-flex!important;align-items:center!important;align-self:flex-start!important;padding:.22rem .58rem!important;border-radius:999px!important;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:.62rem!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:.08em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;background:var(--red)!important;color:#fff!important}#divulgacao .carousel-type-pill.is-reportagem{background:var(--green)!important}#divulgacao .carousel-date{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:.62rem!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:.08em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8)!important}#divulgacao .carousel-title{margin:0!important;max-width:96%!important;font-family:'Montserrat',Arial,sans-serif!important;font-size:clamp(1rem,1.65vw,1.72rem)!important;font-weight:700!important;line-height:1.04!important;letter-spacing:-.035em!important;color:#fff!important;display:-webkit-box!important;-webkit-line-clamp:2!important;-webkit-box-orient:vertical!important;overflow:hidden!important}#divulgacao .carousel-description{margin:0!important;max-width:92%!important;font-size:clamp(.78rem,.9vw,.92rem)!important;line-height:1.35!important;color:rgba(255,255,255,.84)!important;display:-webkit-box!important;-webkit-line-clamp:2!important;-webkit-box-orient:vertical!important;overflow:hidden!important}#divulgacao .carousel-link{margin-top:.12rem!important;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:.68rem!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:.08em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--ochre)!important;text-decoration:none!important;align-self:flex-start!important}
#divulgacao .divulg-arrow{position:absolute!important;top:calc(50% - 1.4rem)!important;transform:translateY(-50%)!important;z-index:10!important;width:54px!important;height:54px!important;border-radius:0!important;border:0!important;background:rgba(35,31,32,.96)!important;color:var(--green-soft)!important;font-size:2.2rem!important;font-weight:500!important;line-height:1!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;cursor:pointer!important;transition:background 180ms ease,color 180ms ease,transform 180ms ease!important}#divulgacao .divulg-prev{left:clamp(.45rem,2vw,2.2rem)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-next{right:clamp(.45rem,2vw,2.2rem)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-arrow:hover{background:var(--green)!important;color:#fff!important;transform:translateY(-50%) scale(1.04)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-dots{position:absolute!important;bottom:1rem!important;left:0!important;right:0!important;display:flex!important;justify-content:center!important;gap:.55rem!important}#divulgacao .divulg-dot{width:9px!important;height:9px!important;border-radius:50%!important;border:0!important;background:rgba(23,23,23,.25)!important;cursor:pointer!important;padding:0!important;transition:background 200ms ease,transform 200ms ease!important}#divulgacao .divulg-dot.active{background:var(--green)!important;transform:scale(1.25)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-empty-media{width:min(1180px,calc(100vw - 2rem))!important;margin-left:auto!important;margin-right:auto!important}
@media(max-width:900px){#divulgacao .divulg-track{padding-left:clamp(3.3rem,7vw,4.5rem)!important;padding-right:clamp(3.3rem,7vw,4.5rem)!important}#divulgacao .carousel-slide{flex-basis:calc((100% - clamp(1rem,2.2vw,2rem)) / 2)!important}}@media(max-width:560px){#divulgacao .section-title,#divulgacao .lead{width:calc(100vw - 1.5rem)!important}#divulgacao .divulg-track{gap:0!important;padding-left:0!important;padding-right:0!important}#divulgacao .carousel-slide{flex-basis:100%!important}#divulgacao .divulg-arrow{width:42px!important;height:42px!important;font-size:1.6rem!important}#divulgacao .carousel-description{display:none!important}}

#pesquisadores-responsaveis.content-card,#pesquisadores-responsaveis.researchers-section,section#pesquisadores-responsaveis{background:rgba(255,253,247,.96)!important}
#logos-institucionais.logos-strip{position:relative!important;left:50%!important;right:auto!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;width:100vw!important;max-width:100vw!important;margin:clamp(3rem,5.4vw,5rem) 0 0!important;padding:clamp(2.6rem,4.2vw,4.2rem) clamp(1.5rem,4vw,4.5rem) clamp(3.2rem,5vw,5rem)!important;background:rgba(255,253,247,.96)!important;border-top:1px solid rgba(98,106,56,.14)!important;border-bottom:0!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;overflow:hidden!important;z-index:2!important}#logos-institucionais.reveal-ready{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(44px)!important}#logos-institucionais.reveal-ready.is-visible{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)!important}.logos-group{margin:0 auto clamp(1.75rem,3.2vw,2.75rem)!important;width:min(1760px,100%)!important}.logos-group:last-child{margin-bottom:0!important}.logos-group-title{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:clamp(.68rem,.9vw,.82rem)!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:.22em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;color:var(--muted)!important;margin:0 0 1.1rem!important;padding-bottom:.58rem!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(98,106,56,.18)!important}.logos-row{display:flex!important;flex-wrap:wrap!important;align-items:center!important;gap:clamp(.8rem,2.35vw,2.1rem) clamp(1.1rem,3vw,2.6rem)!important}.logo-item{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;min-width:clamp(70px,8vw,120px)!important;max-width:178px!important;min-height:48px!important;padding:.35rem!important;border-radius:8px!important;text-decoration:none!important;transition:transform 220ms ease!important}.logo-item img{display:block!important;height:clamp(34px,3.65vw,58px)!important;width:auto!important;max-width:158px!important;object-fit:contain!important;filter:grayscale(100%) opacity(.58)!important;transition:filter 240ms ease,transform 240ms ease!important}.logo-item:hover img{filter:grayscale(0%) opacity(1)!important;transform:scale(1.1)!important}.logo-fallback{display:none!important;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace!important;font-size:.7rem!important;font-weight:800!important;color:var(--muted)!important;letter-spacing:.06em!important;text-transform:uppercase!important}.logo-item.logo-missing .logo-fallback{display:block!important}.logo-item.logo-missing img{display:none!important}body:has(#logos-institucionais) main.content{padding-bottom:0!important}@media(max-width:640px){#logos-institucionais.logos-strip{padding-left:1rem!important;padding-right:1rem!important}.logos-row{gap:.75rem 1rem!important}.logo-item{min-width:76px!important}.logo-item img{height:clamp(26px,8vw,38px)!important;max-width:110px!important}}
</style>
```


```{=html}
<style>
/* ======================================================================
   AJUSTE FINAL — OBJETIVOS DO PROJETO EM CARROSSEL FULL-BLEED
   ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Escopo restrito ao #objetivos. Mantém o restante da página intacto.
   Remove o card branco da seção, mantém o título direto sobre o background,
   usa cards mais largos, fotos mais altas e corpo com texto sem corte.
   O trilho ocupa 100vw: os cards entram pela extremidade direita da tela
   e saem também pela borda direita conforme a navegação avança.
   ====================================================================== */

#objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
  position: relative !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;

  inline-size: 100vw !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-inline-size: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  min-inline-size: 0 !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;

  margin: clamp(2.35rem, 4.4vw, 4.2rem) 0 0 !important;
  padding:
    clamp(0.95rem, 2.5vw, 2.45rem)
    0
    clamp(1.15rem, 3.4vw, 3.25rem) !important;

  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  border-top: 0 !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  isolation: isolate;
}

#objetivos.core-objectives-section::before,
#objetivos.core-objectives-section::after {
  content: none !important;
  display: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-head {
  width: min(1480px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 5vw, 6.2rem))) !important;
  max-width: calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 5vw, 6.2rem)) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;

  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto !important;
  gap: clamp(0.9rem, 2.2vw, 2rem) !important;
  align-items: end !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title-wrap {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 1040px !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-eyebrow {
  width: fit-content !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin-bottom: clamp(0.45rem, 0.9vw, 0.75rem) !important;
  padding: 0.34rem 0.78rem !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.74) !important;
  color: var(--green-dark) !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.28) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.06) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.76vw, 0.74rem) !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title {
  position: relative !important;
  display: block !important;
  width: fit-content !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;

  color: var(--ink) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(2.75rem, 6.35vw, 7.25rem) !important;
  line-height: 0.80 !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.092em !important;
  text-transform: none !important;
  font-style: normal !important;
  transform: rotate(-1.15deg) !important;
  transform-origin: left center !important;
  text-wrap: balance;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line {
  display: block !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-style: normal !important;
  font-weight: 950 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.096em !important;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  text-shadow:
    1px 1px 0 rgba(217,154,39,0.42),
    0 12px 26px rgba(0,0,0,0.07) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b {
  width: fit-content !important;
  margin-left: clamp(1.1rem, 7.5vw, 7.2rem) !important;
  margin-top: 0.01em !important;
  color: var(--red-dark) !important;
  position: relative !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0.02em;
  right: -0.03em;
  bottom: 0.02em;
  height: 0.12em;
  background: rgba(217,154,39,0.70);
  transform: skewX(-16deg) rotate(-0.8deg);
  transform-origin: left center;
  z-index: -1;
}

#objetivos .core-title-ribbon {
  display: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
  max-width: 820px !important;
  margin: clamp(0.75rem, 1.35vw, 1.1rem) 0 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.9rem, 1vw, 1.04rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.56 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: flex-end !important;
  gap: 0.72rem !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin-bottom: clamp(0.05rem, 0.5vw, 0.4rem) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
  inline-size: clamp(44px, 3.45vw, 56px) !important;
  block-size: clamp(44px, 3.45vw, 56px) !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.24) !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.08rem, 1.45vw, 1.32rem) !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  transition:
    transform 180ms ease,
    background 180ms ease,
    color 180ms ease,
    box-shadow 180ms ease !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-prev {
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.76) !important;
  color: var(--green-dark) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-next {
  background: var(--green-dark) !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow:hover,
#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow:focus-visible {
  transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
  background: var(--red) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  outline: none !important;
  box-shadow: 0 13px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.18) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
  position: relative !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  margin: clamp(1.05rem, 2vw, 1.85rem) 0 0 !important;
  padding: 0 0 clamp(0.45rem, 1vw, 0.85rem) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  outline: none !important;
  cursor: grab;
  touch-action: pan-y;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-viewport.is-dragging {
  cursor: grabbing;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-track {
  width: max-content !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
  align-items: flex-end !important;
  gap: clamp(0.9rem, 1.7vw, 1.75rem) !important;

  /* Sem margem lateral: os cards entram e saem pela borda real da tela. */
  padding:
    clamp(0.15rem, 0.55vw, 0.5rem)
    100vw
    clamp(0.55rem, 1.2vw, 1rem)
    0 !important;

  transform: translate3d(0,0,0);
  transition: transform 620ms cubic-bezier(.2,.75,.18,1) !important;
  will-change: transform;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(220px, 18vw, 290px);

  position: relative !important;
  flex: 0 0 clamp(500px, 34vw, 650px) !important;
  width: auto !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: clamp(405px, 29vw, 500px) !important;
  height: auto !important;

  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) auto !important;

  overflow: hidden !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.20) !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 26% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.38), transparent 25%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.18), rgba(217,154,39,0.16)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.91) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 15px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.11) !important;
  opacity: 0.56;
  transform: translateY(42px);
  transform-origin: bottom left;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition:
    flex-basis 520ms cubic-bezier(.2,.75,.18,1),
    min-height 520ms cubic-bezier(.2,.75,.18,1),
    opacity 260ms ease,
    transform 520ms cubic-bezier(.2,.75,.18,1),
    box-shadow 260ms ease,
    filter 260ms ease !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(1) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.32), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(217,154,39,0.24), rgba(98,106,56,0.18)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(2) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 26% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.36), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(169,54,50,0.16), rgba(217,154,39,0.14)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(3) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.30), transparent 24%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.16), rgba(98,106,56,0.16)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(4) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.35), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(217,154,39,0.19), rgba(169,54,50,0.13)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(5) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.33), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(98,106,56,0.22), rgba(215,221,197,0.45)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(6) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.33), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.15), rgba(217,154,39,0.16)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:nth-child(7) {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 24% 8%, rgba(255,255,255,0.32), transparent 26%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(169,54,50,0.14), rgba(98,106,56,0.16)),
    rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:hover {
  opacity: 1;
  filter: saturate(1.03);
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(250px, 22vw, 350px);
  flex-basis: clamp(720px, 54vw, 1040px) !important;
  min-height: clamp(455px, 35vw, 575px) !important;
  opacity: 1;
  transform: translateY(0);
  box-shadow: 0 23px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) !important;
  z-index: 8;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(235px, 19.5vw, 315px);
  flex-basis: clamp(500px, 38vw, 720px) !important;
  min-height: clamp(420px, 31vw, 525px) !important;
  opacity: 0.92;
  transform: translateY(24px);
  z-index: 5;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(190px, 15vw, 250px);
  flex-basis: clamp(320px, 25vw, 520px) !important;
  min-height: clamp(320px, 25vw, 430px) !important;
  opacity: 0.74;
  transform: translateY(50px);
  z-index: 4;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before {
  opacity: 0.38;
  transform: translateY(54px);
}

#objetivos .core-objective-media {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  height: var(--objective-photo-height) !important;
  min-height: var(--objective-photo-height) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  background: rgba(46,59,36,0.14) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-media::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: auto 0 0 0;
  height: 34%;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(0,0,0,0), rgba(0,0,0,0.18));
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 2;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-photo {
  position: absolute !important;
  inset: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(1.025);
  transition: opacity 520ms ease, transform 900ms ease !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-photo.is-photo-active {
  opacity: 1;
  transform: scale(1);
}

#objetivos .core-objective-body {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 1.55vw, 1.45rem) clamp(1rem, 1.75vw, 1.65rem) clamp(1.05rem, 1.65vw, 1.55rem) !important;
  background: rgba(255,253,247,0.92) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
  overflow: visible !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-number {
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  width: clamp(2.05rem, 2.45vw, 2.52rem) !important;
  height: clamp(2.05rem, 2.45vw, 2.52rem) !important;
  border-radius: 50% !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.55rem !important;
  background: var(--green-dark) !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.68rem, 0.82vw, 0.78rem) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-kicker {
  display: block !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.42rem !important;
  color: var(--red-dark) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.58rem, 0.66vw, 0.72rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.24 !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card h3 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.22rem, 1.75vw, 2.05rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.06 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.055em !important;
  text-wrap: balance;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card p {
  margin: 0.55rem 0 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.84rem, 0.92vw, 0.98rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.42 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card:not(.is-active):not(.is-next) p {
  display: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after .core-objective-kicker,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before .core-objective-kicker {
  display: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far h3,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after h3,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before h3 {
  font-size: clamp(0.98rem, 1.2vw, 1.18rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.08 !important;
}

/* Notebook menor / meia tela */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    width: calc(100vw - 2rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 2rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.35rem, 7.1vw, 5.45rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(245px, 24vw, 320px);
    flex-basis: clamp(650px, 62vw, 800px) !important;
    min-height: clamp(450px, 43vw, 560px) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(225px, 21vw, 290px);
    flex-basis: clamp(430px, 41vw, 570px) !important;
    min-height: clamp(405px, 38vw, 510px) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(185px, 17vw, 235px);
    flex-basis: clamp(300px, 29vw, 405px) !important;
    min-height: clamp(315px, 31vw, 420px) !important;
  }
}

/* Tablet */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    padding-top: clamp(1.15rem, 4.2vw, 2.25rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    gap: 0.9rem !important;
    align-items: start !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 1.35rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1.35rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 9.6vw, 4.25rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.82 !important;
    transform: rotate(-1deg) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-title-line-b {
    margin-left: clamp(0.9rem, 10vw, 4.4rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
    width: 100vw !important;
    max-width: 100vw !important;
    margin-top: clamp(1rem, 3vw, 1.7rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-track {
    gap: 0.9rem !important;
    padding-right: 100vw !important;
    padding-left: 0 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(245px, 42vw, 335px);
    flex-basis: min(88vw, 650px) !important;
    min-height: auto !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active {
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
    transform: translateY(18px) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
    transform: translateY(34px) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card:not(.is-active):not(.is-next) p {
    display: block !important;
    font-size: 0.86rem !important;
    line-height: 1.42 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after .core-objective-kicker,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before .core-objective-kicker {
    display: block !important;
  }
}

/* Celular */
@media (max-width: 620px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    margin-top: 2.2rem !important;
    padding-top: 1.15rem !important;
    padding-bottom: 1.8rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 13vw, 3.38rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.85 !important;
    letter-spacing: -0.085em !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-title-line-b {
    margin-left: clamp(0.7rem, 9vw, 2.3rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    font-size: 0.86rem !important;
    line-height: 1.5 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
    gap: 0.55rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
    inline-size: 42px !important;
    block-size: 42px !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
    margin-top: 1rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-track {
    gap: 0.75rem !important;
    padding: 0 100vw 0.8rem 0 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(250px, 62vw, 350px);
    flex-basis: calc(100vw - 0.75rem) !important;
    min-height: auto !important;
    opacity: 1 !important;
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-body {
    padding: 0.98rem 1rem 1.05rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card h3,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far h3,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after h3,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before h3 {
    font-size: clamp(1.28rem, 6.4vw, 1.72rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.06 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card:not(.is-active):not(.is-next) p {
    display: block !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
    -webkit-line-clamp: unset !important;
    font-size: 0.84rem !important;
    line-height: 1.42 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after .core-objective-kicker,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before .core-objective-kicker {
    display: block !important;
  }
}

/* Celular muito estreito */
@media (max-width: 380px) {
  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before {
    --objective-photo-height: 235px;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card:not(.is-active):not(.is-next) p {
    font-size: 0.81rem !important;
    line-height: 1.38 !important;
  }
}

/* Movimento reduzido: mantém navegação sem transições longas. */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  #objetivos .core-objectives-track,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-photo,
  #objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
    transition: none !important;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const root = document.getElementById("objetivos");
    if (!root) return;

    const viewport = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-viewport");
    const track = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-track");
    const cards = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-card"));
    const prev = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-prev");
    const next = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-next");

    if (!viewport || !track || !cards.length) return;

    let activeIndex = 0;
    let photoTimer = null;
    let ticking = false;
    let pointerStartX = null;
    let pointerStartY = null;

    function wrap(index) {
      return (index + cards.length) % cards.length;
    }

    function resetPhotos(card) {
      cards.forEach(function (item) {
        const photos = Array.from(item.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-photo"));
        photos.forEach(function (photo, i) {
          photo.classList.toggle("is-photo-active", i === 0);
        });
        item.dataset.photoIndex = "0";
      });

      if (photoTimer) {
        clearInterval(photoTimer);
        photoTimer = null;
      }

      const activePhotos = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-photo"));
      if (activePhotos.length <= 1 || window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) return;

      photoTimer = setInterval(function () {
        const current = Number(card.dataset.photoIndex || 0);
        const nextPhoto = (current + 1) % activePhotos.length;
        card.dataset.photoIndex = String(nextPhoto);

        activePhotos.forEach(function (photo, i) {
          photo.classList.toggle("is-photo-active", i === nextPhoto);
        });
      }, 3600);
    }

    function classifyCards() {
      cards.forEach(function (card, i) {
        const distance = i - activeIndex;

        card.classList.toggle("is-active", distance === 0);
        card.classList.toggle("is-next", distance === 1);
        card.classList.toggle("is-far", distance === 2);
        card.classList.toggle("is-after", distance > 2);
        card.classList.toggle("is-before", distance < 0);
        card.setAttribute("aria-current", distance === 0 ? "true" : "false");
        card.setAttribute("tabindex", distance === 0 ? "0" : "-1");
      });
    }

    function alignActiveCard() {
      const activeCard = cards[activeIndex];
      if (!activeCard) return;

      const viewportWidth = viewport.clientWidth;
      const maxShift = Math.max(0, track.scrollWidth - viewportWidth);
      const isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 620px)").matches;
      const leftBreath = isMobile ? 0 : 0;

      const desired = Math.max(0, activeCard.offsetLeft - leftBreath);
      const shift = Math.min(maxShift, desired);

      track.style.transform = "translate3d(" + (-shift) + "px, 0, 0)";
    }

    function requestAlign() {
      if (ticking) return;
      ticking = true;
      window.requestAnimationFrame(function () {
        ticking = false;
        alignActiveCard();
      });
    }

    function setActive(index, shouldFocus) {
      activeIndex = wrap(index);
      classifyCards();
      resetPhotos(cards[activeIndex]);
      requestAlign();

      if (shouldFocus) {
        cards[activeIndex].focus({ preventScroll: true });
      }
    }

    cards.forEach(function (card, i) {
      card.addEventListener("click", function () {
        setActive(i, false);
      });

      card.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {
        if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setActive(i, true);
        }
      });
    });

    if (prev) {
      prev.addEventListener("click", function () {
        setActive(activeIndex - 1, false);
      });
    }

    if (next) {
      next.addEventListener("click", function () {
        setActive(activeIndex + 1, false);
      });
    }

    viewport.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {
      if (event.key === "ArrowRight") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(activeIndex + 1, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(activeIndex - 1, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "Home") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(0, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "End") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(cards.length - 1, false);
      }
    });

    viewport.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (event) {
      pointerStartX = event.clientX;
      pointerStartY = event.clientY;
      viewport.classList.add("is-dragging");
    }, { passive: true });

    viewport.addEventListener("pointerup", function (event) {
      if (pointerStartX === null || pointerStartY === null) {
        viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");
        return;
      }

      const dx = event.clientX - pointerStartX;
      const dy = event.clientY - pointerStartY;

      viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");

      if (Math.abs(dx) > 46 && Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy) * 1.2) {
        setActive(activeIndex + (dx < 0 ? 1 : -1), false);
      }

      pointerStartX = null;
      pointerStartY = null;
    }, { passive: true });

    viewport.addEventListener("pointercancel", function () {
      pointerStartX = null;
      pointerStartY = null;
      viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");
    }, { passive: true });

    window.addEventListener("resize", requestAlign, { passive: true });

    if (window.ResizeObserver) {
      const ro = new ResizeObserver(requestAlign);
      ro.observe(root);
      ro.observe(viewport);
      ro.observe(track);
    }

    if (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) {
      document.fonts.ready.then(requestAlign);
    }

    window.addEventListener("load", requestAlign);

    setActive(0, false);
  });
})();
</script>
```


```{=html}
<style>
/* ======================================================================
   AJUSTE FINAL FINO — OBJETIVOS MAIS COMPACTOS NO MESMO FRAME
   ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Escopo apenas #objetivos. Reduz o respiro vertical entre título, lead e
   carrossel; aumenta a área útil das fotos; mantém os cards saindo/entrando
   pelas extremidades da tela; impede corte do texto no card ativo.
   ====================================================================== */

#objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
  margin-top: clamp(1.35rem, 2.6vw, 2.8rem) !important;
  padding-top: clamp(0.2rem, 0.75vw, 0.7rem) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(0.65rem, 1.6vw, 1.35rem) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-head {
  width: min(1480px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 4.2vw, 5.4rem))) !important;
  max-width: calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 4.2vw, 5.4rem)) !important;
  margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  gap: clamp(0.65rem, 1.5vw, 1.45rem) !important;
  align-items: end !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title-wrap {
  max-width: 960px !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-eyebrow {
  margin-bottom: clamp(0.22rem, 0.45vw, 0.42rem) !important;
  padding: 0.28rem 0.68rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.58rem, 0.68vw, 0.68rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title {
  font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 4.75vw, 5.35rem) !important;
  line-height: 0.74 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.098em !important;
  transform: rotate(-0.85deg) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line {
  letter-spacing: -0.102em !important;
  text-shadow:
    1px 1px 0 rgba(217,154,39,0.34),
    0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.055) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b {
  margin-left: clamp(0.75rem, 5.2vw, 5rem) !important;
  margin-top: -0.02em !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b::after {
  bottom: 0.015em !important;
  height: 0.105em !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
  max-width: 760px !important;
  margin-top: clamp(0.3rem, 0.65vw, 0.52rem) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.84rem, 0.88vw, 0.96rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.42 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
  margin-bottom: clamp(0.15rem, 1.6vw, 1.35rem) !important;
  gap: 0.58rem !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
  inline-size: clamp(40px, 3vw, 50px) !important;
  block-size: clamp(40px, 3vw, 50px) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
  margin-top: clamp(0.15rem, 0.7vw, 0.62rem) !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(0.25rem, 0.8vw, 0.65rem) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-track {
  align-items: flex-start !important;
  gap: clamp(0.75rem, 1.35vw, 1.35rem) !important;
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  padding-bottom: clamp(0.35rem, 0.9vw, 0.75rem) !important;
}

/* Cards: mais largos, fotos mais altas, corpo mais compacto e sem corte no ativo. */
#objetivos .core-objective-card {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(285px, 33vh, 360px);

  flex-basis: clamp(560px, 40vw, 760px) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: auto !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) minmax(150px, auto) !important;
  transform: translateY(28px) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(305px, 35vh, 380px);

  flex-basis: clamp(760px, 60vw, 1080px) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: auto !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) minmax(165px, auto) !important;
  transform: translateY(0) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(292px, 33vh, 365px);

  flex-basis: clamp(620px, 47vw, 860px) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: auto !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) minmax(150px, auto) !important;
  transform: translateY(14px) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
  --objective-photo-height: clamp(260px, 30vh, 330px);

  flex-basis: clamp(430px, 33vw, 650px) !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  height: auto !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) minmax(118px, auto) !important;
  transform: translateY(28px) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before {
  transform: translateY(32px) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-media {
  height: var(--objective-photo-height) !important;
  min-height: var(--objective-photo-height) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-photo {
  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center 45% !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-body {
  padding:
    clamp(0.78rem, 1.1vw, 1.08rem)
    clamp(0.9rem, 1.25vw, 1.22rem)
    clamp(0.85rem, 1.15vw, 1.1rem) !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-number {
  width: clamp(1.82rem, 2vw, 2.18rem) !important;
  height: clamp(1.82rem, 2vw, 2.18rem) !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.42rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.6rem, 0.72vw, 0.72rem) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-kicker {
  margin-bottom: 0.32rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.54rem, 0.6vw, 0.66rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1.22rem, 1.68vw, 2rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.03 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.06em !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card p {
  margin-top: 0.46rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.8rem, 0.84vw, 0.94rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.34 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active p,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next p {
  display: block !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: unset !important;
  -webkit-box-orient: unset !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
}

/* Notebook menor e meia tela: mantém o bloco inteiro mais congestionado. */
@media (max-width: 1180px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    padding-top: 0.35rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    width: calc(100vw - 1.4rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1.4rem) !important;
    gap: 0.7rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.05rem, 6.2vw, 4.7rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.76 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    margin-top: 0.35rem !important;
    font-size: clamp(0.82rem, 1.15vw, 0.94rem) !important;
    line-height: 1.38 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
    margin-top: 0.35rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(285px, 34vh, 350px);
    flex-basis: clamp(660px, 68vw, 860px) !important;
    grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) minmax(160px, auto) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(270px, 32vh, 330px);
    flex-basis: clamp(520px, 52vw, 680px) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(245px, 30vh, 305px);
    flex-basis: clamp(360px, 38vw, 500px) !important;
  }
}

/* Tablet: evita corte horizontal e mantém cards amplos. */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    padding-top: 0.55rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    gap: 0.55rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
    margin-bottom: 0 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.15rem, 9vw, 4.1rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.8 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
    margin-top: 0.45rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(260px, 42vw, 350px);
    flex-basis: min(86vw, 680px) !important;
    grid-template-rows: var(--objective-photo-height) auto !important;
    transform: translateY(0) !important;
  }
}

/* Celular: mantém leitura vertical, sem tentar forçar tudo no mesmo frame. */
@media (max-width: 620px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    margin-top: 2rem !important;
    padding-top: 0.65rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 13vw, 3.2rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.83 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    font-size: 0.84rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-active,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-far,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-after,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-before {
    --objective-photo-height: clamp(245px, 70vw, 360px);
    flex-basis: calc(100vw - 1.4rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card h3 {
    font-size: clamp(1.28rem, 6.6vw, 1.78rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card:not(.is-active):not(.is-next) p {
    display: block !important;
    overflow: visible !important;
  }
}
</style>
```


```{=html}
<style>
/* ======================================================================
   AJUSTE FINAL — OBJETIVOS COM 3 CARDS VISÍVEIS E CARD ATIVO CENTRAL
   ----------------------------------------------------------------------
   Escopo exclusivo: #objetivos.
   Funcionamento:
   - card ativo sempre centralizado;
   - card anterior menor e mais baixo à esquerda;
   - card seguinte menor e mais baixo à direita;
   - no primeiro objetivo, a esquerda fica vazia e o próximo aparece à direita;
   - cards entram e saem pelas extremidades laterais da tela;
   - bloco mais compacto verticalmente para caber melhor no frame.
   ====================================================================== */

#objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
  position: relative !important;
  left: 50% !important;
  right: auto !important;
  transform: translateX(-50%) !important;

  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;

  margin: clamp(1rem, 1.8vw, 2rem) 0 0 0 !important;
  padding:
    clamp(0.25rem, 0.75vw, 0.75rem)
    0
    clamp(0.8rem, 1.4vw, 1.25rem)
    0 !important;

  background: transparent !important;
  border: 0 !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  isolation: isolate;

  --objective-active-w: 680px;
  --objective-side-w: 460px;
  --objective-active-h: 450px;
  --objective-side-h: 392px;
  --objective-active-photo-h: 270px;
  --objective-side-photo-h: 245px;
  --objective-offset: 600px;
  --objective-side-y: 46px;
  --objective-viewport-h: 500px;
}

#objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section.reveal-ready {
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(44px) !important;
}

#objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section.reveal-ready.is-visible {
  transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0) !important;
}

#objetivos.core-objectives-section::before {
  display: none !important;
  content: none !important;
}

/* Cabeçalho mais compacto */
#objetivos .core-objectives-head {
  width: min(1400px, calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 5vw, 7rem))) !important;
  max-width: calc(100vw - clamp(1rem, 5vw, 7rem)) !important;
  margin: 0 auto !important;

  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto !important;
  gap: clamp(0.55rem, 1.4vw, 1.25rem) !important;
  align-items: end !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title-wrap {
  min-width: 0 !important;
  max-width: 860px !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-eyebrow {
  margin: 0 0 clamp(0.12rem, 0.3vw, 0.28rem) 0 !important;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.62rem !important;
  line-height: 1.05 !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.56rem, 0.66vw, 0.68rem) !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-title {
  margin: 0 !important;
  max-width: none !important;

  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(2.2rem, 4.9vw, 5.35rem) !important;
  line-height: 0.72 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.105em !important;

  color: var(--ink) !important;
  transform: rotate(-0.7deg) !important;
  transform-origin: left center !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line {
  display: block !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
  white-space: nowrap !important;
  text-shadow:
    1px 1px 0 rgba(217,154,39,0.32),
    0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.055) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b {
  position: relative !important;
  display: inline-block !important;
  margin-left: clamp(0.75rem, 5.2vw, 5.2rem) !important;
  margin-top: -0.015em !important;
  color: var(--red-dark) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-title-line-b::after {
  content: "" !important;
  position: absolute !important;
  left: -0.04em !important;
  right: -0.05em !important;
  bottom: 0.02em !important;
  height: 0.1em !important;
  background: rgba(217,154,39,0.72) !important;
  z-index: -1 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
  max-width: 690px !important;
  margin: clamp(0.22rem, 0.55vw, 0.45rem) 0 0 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;

  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.82rem, 0.9vw, 0.95rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.32 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: flex-end !important;
  gap: 0.58rem !important;
  margin: 0 0 clamp(0.25rem, 0.8vw, 0.75rem) 0 !important;
  z-index: 12 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
  inline-size: clamp(40px, 3vw, 50px) !important;
  block-size: clamp(40px, 3vw, 50px) !important;
  border-radius: 999px !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.22) !important;
  display: grid !important;
  place-items: center !important;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.3vw, 1.25rem) !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  transition:
    transform 180ms ease,
    background 180ms ease,
    color 180ms ease,
    opacity 180ms ease,
    box-shadow 180ms ease !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-prev {
  background: rgba(246,241,232,0.72) !important;
  color: var(--green-dark) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-next {
  background: var(--green-dark) !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.14) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow:hover,
#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow:focus-visible {
  transform: translateY(-2px) !important;
  background: var(--red) !important;
  color: #fff !important;
  outline: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow.is-disabled,
#objetivos .core-objectives-arrow:disabled {
  opacity: 0.34 !important;
  cursor: default !important;
  transform: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* Palco dos cards: altura controlada via JS */
#objetivos .core-objectives-viewport {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;

  height: var(--objective-viewport-h) !important;
  margin: clamp(0.3rem, 0.75vw, 0.65rem) 0 0 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;

  overflow: hidden !important;
  outline: none !important;
  cursor: grab !important;
  touch-action: pan-y !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-viewport.is-dragging {
  cursor: grabbing !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objectives-track {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100vw !important;
  max-width: 100vw !important;
  height: var(--objective-viewport-h) !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;

  display: block !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  transform: none !important;
  transition: none !important;
  will-change: auto !important;
}

/* Estado base: todos saem pela direita até receberem uma classe visível */
#objetivos .core-objective-card {
  position: absolute !important;
  top: 0 !important;
  left: 50% !important;

  width: var(--objective-side-w) !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  height: var(--objective-side-h) !important;

  display: grid !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-side-photo-h) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
  flex: none !important;

  overflow: hidden !important;
  border-radius: 0 !important;
  border: 1px solid rgba(98,106,56,0.18) !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.98), rgba(246,241,232,0.90)) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 16px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.10) !important;

  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  z-index: 1 !important;

  transform:
    translate3d(calc(-50% + 100vw), var(--objective-side-y), 0)
    scale(0.88) !important;
  transform-origin: center bottom !important;

  transition:
    transform 620ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.18,1),
    opacity 260ms ease,
    width 420ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.18,1),
    height 420ms cubic-bezier(.2,.78,.18,1),
    box-shadow 260ms ease,
    filter 260ms ease !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-current {
  width: var(--objective-active-w) !important;
  height: var(--objective-active-h) !important;
  grid-template-rows: var(--objective-active-photo-h) minmax(0, 1fr) !important;

  opacity: 1 !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  z-index: 8 !important;

  transform: translate3d(-50%, 0, 0) scale(1) !important;
  box-shadow: 0 24px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.16) !important;
  filter: saturate(1.02) contrast(1.02) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev {
  opacity: 0.86 !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  z-index: 5 !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(calc(-50% - var(--objective-offset)), var(--objective-side-y), 0)
    scale(0.94) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next {
  opacity: 0.92 !important;
  pointer-events: auto !important;
  z-index: 5 !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(calc(-50% + var(--objective-offset)), var(--objective-side-y), 0)
    scale(0.94) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-hidden-left {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(calc(-50% - 100vw), var(--objective-side-y), 0)
    scale(0.82) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-hidden-right {
  opacity: 0 !important;
  pointer-events: none !important;
  transform:
    translate3d(calc(-50% + 100vw), var(--objective-side-y), 0)
    scale(0.82) !important;
}

/* Imagens: mais altas, sem achatamento */
#objetivos .core-objective-media {
  position: relative !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: auto !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;
  max-height: none !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
  background:
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(46,59,36,0.18), rgba(217,154,39,0.12)),
    var(--green-soft) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-media::after {
  display: none !important;
  content: none !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-photo {
  position: absolute !important;
  inset: 0 !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;

  object-fit: cover !important;
  object-position: center center !important;

  opacity: 0 !important;
  transform: scale(1.025) !important;
  transition: opacity 520ms ease, transform 900ms ease !important;
}
```
