```{=html}
#objetivos .core-objective-photo.is-photo-active {
  opacity: 1 !important;
  transform: scale(1) !important;
}

/* Corpo do card */
#objetivos .core-objective-body {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  min-width: 0 !important;
  min-height: 0 !important;

  padding:
    clamp(0.82rem, 1vw, 1.05rem)
    clamp(0.9rem, 1.25vw, 1.25rem)
    clamp(0.86rem, 1.05vw, 1.15rem) !important;

  background:
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255,253,247,0.96), rgba(246,241,232,0.92)) !important;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-number {
  display: inline-flex !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  justify-content: center !important;

  width: clamp(1.9rem, 2.1vw, 2.3rem) !important;
  height: clamp(1.9rem, 2.1vw, 2.3rem) !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.42rem 0 !important;
  border-radius: 50% !important;

  background: var(--green-dark) !important;
  color: var(--cream) !important;

  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.62rem, 0.7vw, 0.75rem) !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  line-height: 1 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-kicker {
  display: block !important;
  margin: 0 0 0.34rem 0 !important;

  color: var(--red-dark) !important;
  font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.54rem, 0.62vw, 0.69rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.16 !important;
  font-weight: 800 !important;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em !important;
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card h3 {
  margin: 0 !important;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  font-family: 'Montserrat', Arial, sans-serif !important;
  font-size: clamp(1.16rem, 1.48vw, 1.85rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.02 !important;
  font-weight: 900 !important;
  letter-spacing: -0.065em !important;
  text-wrap: balance;
  overflow-wrap: normal !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card p {
  margin: 0.42rem 0 0 0 !important;
  color: var(--muted) !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.78rem, 0.84vw, 0.92rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.3 !important;
  font-weight: 500 !important;
  display: block !important;
  overflow: visible !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: unset !important;
  -webkit-box-orient: unset !important;
}

/* Cards laterais: texto mais resumido para manter a leitura sem cortar */
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev .core-objective-number,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next .core-objective-number {
  width: clamp(1.75rem, 1.9vw, 2.05rem) !important;
  height: clamp(1.75rem, 1.9vw, 2.05rem) !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.34rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.56rem, 0.66vw, 0.68rem) !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev .core-objective-kicker,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next .core-objective-kicker {
  font-size: clamp(0.49rem, 0.56vw, 0.62rem) !important;
  margin-bottom: 0.26rem !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev h3,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next h3 {
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.16vw, 1.35rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.03 !important;
}

#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev p,
#objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next p {
  margin-top: 0.35rem !important;
  font-size: clamp(0.72rem, 0.75vw, 0.82rem) !important;
  line-height: 1.25 !important;

  display: -webkit-box !important;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2 !important;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical !important;
  overflow: hidden !important;
}

/* Tablet: mantém o ativo central e mostra laterais menores/parciais */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    padding-top: 0.5rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr !important;
    width: calc(100vw - 1.1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1.1rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-controls {
    justify-content: flex-start !important;
    margin-top: 0.25rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2.05rem, 9vw, 4.2rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    max-width: 100% !important;
  }
}

/* Celular: prioriza um card central legível, com vizinhos sugeridos nas bordas. */
@media (max-width: 620px) {
  #objetivos.objectives-section.core-objectives-section {
    margin-top: 1.6rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-head {
    width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
    max-width: calc(100vw - 1rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-eyebrow {
    font-size: 0.56rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-title {
    font-size: clamp(2rem, 13vw, 3.25rem) !important;
    line-height: 0.78 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-title-line-b {
    margin-left: 0.7rem !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objectives-lead {
    font-size: 0.82rem !important;
    line-height: 1.34 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card h3 {
    font-size: clamp(1.15rem, 5.9vw, 1.62rem) !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card p {
    font-size: 0.78rem !important;
    line-height: 1.34 !important;
  }

  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next p,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-prev .core-objective-kicker,
  #objetivos .core-objective-card.is-next .core-objective-kicker {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  #objetivos .core-objective-card,
  #objetivos .core-objective-photo,
  #objetivos .core-objectives-arrow {
    transition: none !important;
  }
}
</style>

<script>
(function () {
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const root = document.getElementById("objetivos");
    if (!root) return;

    const viewport = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-viewport");
    const track = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-track");
    const cards = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-card"));
    const prevBtn = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-prev");
    const nextBtn = root.querySelector(".core-objectives-next");

    if (!viewport || !track || !cards.length) return;

    let activeIndex = 0;
    let photoTimer = null;
    let startX = null;
    let startY = null;
    let isDragging = false;

    function clamp(value, min, max) {
      return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
    }

    function measure() {
      const vw = Math.max(document.documentElement.clientWidth || 0, window.innerWidth || 0);
      const vh = Math.max(document.documentElement.clientHeight || 0, window.innerHeight || 0);
      const isMobile = vw <= 620;
      const isTablet = vw > 620 && vw <= 900;

      let gap;
      let activeW;
      let sideW;
      let activeH;

      if (isMobile) {
        gap = clamp(vw * 0.035, 14, 22);
        activeW = clamp(vw * 0.84, 300, vw - 34);
        sideW = clamp(vw * 0.66, 230, vw * 0.72);
        activeH = clamp(vh * 0.50, 390, 470);
      } else if (isTablet) {
        gap = clamp(vw * 0.022, 18, 28);
        activeW = clamp(vw * 0.62, 470, 600);
        sideW = clamp(vw * 0.39, 300, 410);
        activeH = clamp(vh * 0.50, 405, 500);
      } else {
        gap = clamp(vw * 0.018, 22, 36);
        activeW = clamp(vw * 0.40, 560, 720);

        const sideBase = clamp(vw * 0.285, 380, 500);
        const sideMaxThatStillFits = Math.max(300, (vw - activeW - (2 * gap) - 32) / 2);
        sideW = Math.min(sideBase, sideMaxThatStillFits);

        activeH = clamp(vh * 0.52, 410, 505);
      }

      const sideH = isMobile ? activeH * 0.88 : activeH * 0.86;
      const activePhotoH = activeH * (isMobile ? 0.60 : 0.61);
      const sidePhotoH = sideH * (isMobile ? 0.62 : 0.63);
      const sideY = isMobile ? 38 : clamp(vh * 0.055, 36, 58);
      const offset = (activeW / 2) + gap + (sideW / 2);
      const viewportH = activeH + sideY + (isMobile ? 16 : 18);

      root.style.setProperty("--objective-active-w", Math.round(activeW) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-side-w", Math.round(sideW) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-active-h", Math.round(activeH) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-side-h", Math.round(sideH) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-active-photo-h", Math.round(activePhotoH) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-side-photo-h", Math.round(sidePhotoH) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-offset", Math.round(offset) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-side-y", Math.round(sideY) + "px");
      root.style.setProperty("--objective-viewport-h", Math.round(viewportH) + "px");

      track.style.transform = "none";
      viewport.style.height = Math.round(viewportH) + "px";
      track.style.height = Math.round(viewportH) + "px";

      render();
    }

    function resetPhotos(card) {
      cards.forEach(function (item) {
        const photos = Array.from(item.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-photo"));
        photos.forEach(function (photo, i) {
          photo.classList.toggle("is-photo-active", i === 0);
        });
        item.dataset.photoIndex = "0";
      });

      if (photoTimer) {
        clearInterval(photoTimer);
        photoTimer = null;
      }

      const photos = Array.from(card.querySelectorAll(".core-objective-photo"));
      if (photos.length <= 1 || window.matchMedia("(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)").matches) return;

      photoTimer = setInterval(function () {
        const current = Number(card.dataset.photoIndex || 0);
        const nextPhoto = (current + 1) % photos.length;
        card.dataset.photoIndex = String(nextPhoto);

        photos.forEach(function (photo, i) {
          photo.classList.toggle("is-photo-active", i === nextPhoto);
        });
      }, 3600);
    }

    function render() {
      cards.forEach(function (card, i) {
        card.classList.remove(
          "is-active",
          "is-current",
          "is-prev",
          "is-next",
          "is-far",
          "is-after",
          "is-before",
          "is-hidden-left",
          "is-hidden-right"
        );

        if (i === activeIndex) {
          card.classList.add("is-current");
          card.setAttribute("aria-current", "true");
          card.setAttribute("tabindex", "0");
        } else if (i === activeIndex - 1) {
          card.classList.add("is-prev");
          card.setAttribute("aria-current", "false");
          card.setAttribute("tabindex", "-1");
        } else if (i === activeIndex + 1) {
          card.classList.add("is-next");
          card.setAttribute("aria-current", "false");
          card.setAttribute("tabindex", "-1");
        } else if (i < activeIndex - 1) {
          card.classList.add("is-hidden-left");
          card.setAttribute("aria-current", "false");
          card.setAttribute("tabindex", "-1");
        } else {
          card.classList.add("is-hidden-right");
          card.setAttribute("aria-current", "false");
          card.setAttribute("tabindex", "-1");
        }
      });

      if (prevBtn) {
        const disabled = activeIndex === 0;
        prevBtn.classList.toggle("is-disabled", disabled);
        prevBtn.disabled = disabled;
        prevBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", disabled ? "true" : "false");
      }

      if (nextBtn) {
        const disabled = activeIndex === cards.length - 1;
        nextBtn.classList.toggle("is-disabled", disabled);
        nextBtn.disabled = disabled;
        nextBtn.setAttribute("aria-disabled", disabled ? "true" : "false");
      }
    }

    function setActive(index, shouldFocus) {
      const nextIndex = clamp(index, 0, cards.length - 1);
      if (nextIndex === activeIndex) {
        render();
        return;
      }

      activeIndex = nextIndex;
      render();
      resetPhotos(cards[activeIndex]);

      if (shouldFocus && cards[activeIndex]) {
        cards[activeIndex].focus({ preventScroll: true });
      }
    }

    function captureButton(event, direction) {
      event.preventDefault();
      event.stopPropagation();
      if (typeof event.stopImmediatePropagation === "function") {
        event.stopImmediatePropagation();
      }

      setActive(activeIndex + direction, false);
    }

    if (prevBtn) {
      prevBtn.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        captureButton(event, -1);
      }, true);
    }

    if (nextBtn) {
      nextBtn.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        captureButton(event, 1);
      }, true);
    }

    cards.forEach(function (card, i) {
      card.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
        event.preventDefault();
        event.stopPropagation();
        if (typeof event.stopImmediatePropagation === "function") {
          event.stopImmediatePropagation();
        }
        setActive(i, false);
      }, true);

      card.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {
        if (event.key === "Enter" || event.key === " ") {
          event.preventDefault();
          setActive(i, true);
        }
      }, true);
    });

    viewport.addEventListener("keydown", function (event) {
      if (event.key === "ArrowRight") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(activeIndex + 1, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "ArrowLeft") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(activeIndex - 1, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "Home") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(0, false);
      }

      if (event.key === "End") {
        event.preventDefault();
        setActive(cards.length - 1, false);
      }
    }, true);

    viewport.addEventListener("pointerdown", function (event) {
      startX = event.clientX;
      startY = event.clientY;
      isDragging = true;
      viewport.classList.add("is-dragging");
    }, { passive: true });

    viewport.addEventListener("pointerup", function (event) {
      if (!isDragging || startX === null || startY === null) {
        viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");
        return;
      }

      const dx = event.clientX - startX;
      const dy = event.clientY - startY;

      viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");
      isDragging = false;

      if (Math.abs(dx) > 46 && Math.abs(dx) > Math.abs(dy) * 1.2) {
        setActive(activeIndex + (dx < 0 ? 1 : -1), false);
      }

      startX = null;
      startY = null;
    }, { passive: true });

    viewport.addEventListener("pointercancel", function () {
      isDragging = false;
      startX = null;
      startY = null;
      viewport.classList.remove("is-dragging");
    }, { passive: true });

    window.addEventListener("resize", function () {
      window.requestAnimationFrame(measure);
    }, { passive: true });

    if (window.ResizeObserver) {
      const observer = new ResizeObserver(function () {
        window.requestAnimationFrame(measure);
      });
      observer.observe(root);
      observer.observe(viewport);
    }

    if (document.fonts && document.fonts.ready) {
      document.fonts.ready.then(measure);
    }

    window.addEventListener("load", measure);

    activeIndex = 0;
    resetPhotos(cards[activeIndex]);
    measure();
    render();
  });
})();
</script>
```
